name: Sentinel-2 MSI Level-1C Top-of-Atmosphere Reflectance
provider: European Space Agency / Copernicus
license: Copernicus free and open data policy
formats: SAFE, JP2, COG via cloud mirrors, STAC, GEE asset
access: Copernicus Data Space portal/API; Google Earth Engine COPERNICUS/S2_HARMONIZED; cloud mirrors
doi_or_citation: Copernicus Sentinel-2 mission and MSI L1C product documentation
notes: Canonical multispectral optical mission record. GEE HARMONIZED collection is an analysis mirror and should not be counted separately.
desc_zh: Sentinel-2 MSI Level-1C 是 Copernicus/ESA 发布的全球多光谱正射顶层大气反射率产品，覆盖可见光、近红外和短波红外 13 个波段。它是许多地表覆盖、植被、水体和城市监测工作流的基础输入，可通过 Copernicus Data Space、API、云镜像和 Google Earth Engine 访问。
desc_en: Sentinel-2 MSI Level-1C is the Copernicus/ESA global orthorectified top-of-atmosphere multispectral reflectance product with 13 visible, near-infrared, and shortwave-infrared bands. It is a backbone input for land-cover, vegetation, water, and urban monitoring workflows and is accessible through Copernicus Data Space, APIs, cloud mirrors, and Google Earth Engine.
feature_count: 13 spectral bands
file_size: scene-based archive

name: Sentinel-2 MSI Level-2A Surface Reflectance
provider: European Space Agency / Copernicus
license: Copernicus free and open data policy
formats: SAFE, JP2, COG via cloud mirrors, STAC, GEE asset
access: Copernicus Data Space portal/API; Google Earth Engine COPERNICUS/S2_SR_HARMONIZED; cloud mirrors
doi_or_citation: Copernicus Sentinel-2 Level-2A surface reflectance product documentation
time_span: 2017-present, with global routine production from late 2018
notes: Atmospherically corrected Sentinel-2 product; cloud masks and quality layers are part of common workflows.
desc_zh: Sentinel-2 MSI Level-2A 是多光谱地表反射率产品，面向地表变化、农情、生态、水体和灾害监测等应用。它保留 Sentinel-2 的 10/20/60 米多尺度波段，并提供质量与场景分类信息，是开源多光谱分析就绪数据的核心数据源之一。
desc_en: Sentinel-2 MSI Level-2A is an atmospherically corrected multispectral surface reflectance product for land-change, agriculture, ecology, water, and disaster monitoring. It preserves the Sentinel-2 10/20/60 m band structure and includes quality and scene classification information, making it one of the central open analysis-ready multispectral sources.
feature_count: 13 spectral bands plus QA layers
file_size: scene-based archive

name: Landsat Collection 2 Level-1
provider: U.S. Geological Survey / NASA
license: public domain / USGS open data
formats: GeoTIFF, COG via cloud mirrors, MTL metadata, STAC/GEE
access: USGS EarthExplorer/M2M/API; Google Earth Engine; AWS/Google cloud public datasets
doi_or_citation: USGS Landsat Collection 2 Level-1 product documentation
notes: Canonical archive for Landsat MSS/TM/ETM+/OLI/TIRS Level-1 scenes; includes multispectral sensors across the Landsat record.
desc_zh: Landsat Collection 2 Level-1 是 USGS/NASA 的长期全球 Landsat 多光谱影像基础档案，覆盖 MSS、TM、ETM+、OLI 等多代传感器。它提供几何校正后的 Level-1 场景，是 1970 年代以来陆表变化分析和下游地表反射率产品的源数据。
desc_en: Landsat Collection 2 Level-1 is the USGS/NASA long-term global Landsat multispectral image archive spanning MSS, TM, ETM+, OLI, and related sensors. It provides geometrically corrected Level-1 scenes and forms the source record for land-change analysis and downstream surface reflectance products since the 1970s.
feature_count: multi-mission Landsat scene archive
file_size: scene-based archive

name: Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 Surface Reflectance
provider: U.S. Geological Survey / NASA
license: public domain / USGS open data
formats: GeoTIFF, COG via cloud mirrors, QA bands, STAC/GEE
access: USGS EarthExplorer/M2M/API; Google Earth Engine LANDSAT/*/C02/T1_L2; cloud mirrors
doi_or_citation: USGS Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 Science Products documentation
notes: Surface reflectance and surface temperature science products; this row tracks the optical multispectral SR component.
desc_zh: Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 Surface Reflectance 是 USGS 的 Landsat 多光谱地表反射率产品，用于长期陆表变化、植被、水体、城市和灾害分析。它以 Collection 2 Level-1 为基础进行大气校正，并通过 USGS、GEE 和公共云入口提供。
desc_en: Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 Surface Reflectance is the USGS multispectral Landsat surface reflectance product for long-term land-change, vegetation, water, urban, and disaster analysis. It is atmospherically corrected from Collection 2 Level-1 inputs and is available through USGS systems, Google Earth Engine, and public cloud access routes.
feature_count: multispectral SR bands plus QA layers
file_size: scene-based archive

name: Harmonized Landsat Sentinel-2 S30
provider: NASA Goddard Space Flight Center / LP DAAC
license: NASA open data
formats: COG, HDF/metadata, STAC, Earthdata, GEE
access: NASA Earthdata/LPCLOUD; AWS Open Data; Google Earth Engine NASA/HLS/HLSS30/v002
doi_or_citation: HLS S30 v2.0 product citation via NASA LP DAAC
notes: Harmonizes Sentinel-2 observations to a 30 m Landsat-like grid; core bridge product for Landsat/Sentinel time series.
desc_zh: HLS S30 将 Sentinel-2 MSI 多光谱观测处理到与 Landsat 一致的 30 米网格和光谱/几何约定，便于构建高频全球陆表时间序列。它是 Landsat 与 Sentinel-2 联合分析的关键开放产品，可通过 NASA Earthdata、LPCLOUD、AWS 和 GEE 访问。
desc_en: HLS S30 harmonizes Sentinel-2 MSI multispectral observations onto a Landsat-compatible 30 m grid with consistent spectral and geometric conventions. It is a key open product for joint Landsat/Sentinel land time series and is available through NASA Earthdata, LPCLOUD, AWS, and Google Earth Engine.
feature_count: Sentinel-2 harmonized multispectral bands plus QA
file_size: tile-based archive

name: Harmonized Landsat Sentinel-2 L30
provider: NASA Goddard Space Flight Center / LP DAAC
license: NASA open data
formats: COG, HDF/metadata, STAC, Earthdata, GEE
access: NASA Earthdata/LPCLOUD; AWS Open Data; Google Earth Engine NASA/HLS/HLSL30/v002
doi_or_citation: HLS L30 v2.0 product citation via NASA LP DAAC
notes: Harmonizes Landsat observations to the HLS grid and conventions; paired with S30 for dense multispectral monitoring.
desc_zh: HLS L30 将 Landsat 多光谱地表反射率处理成与 HLS S30 一致的 30 米产品，支持 Landsat 和 Sentinel-2 的联合时序分析。它适合农作物、物候、扰动和土地覆盖监测，并提供 NASA、公共云和 GEE 等访问路径。
desc_en: HLS L30 processes Landsat multispectral surface reflectance into a 30 m product consistent with HLS S30, enabling joint Landsat and Sentinel-2 time-series analysis. It supports crop, phenology, disturbance, and land-cover monitoring with access through NASA systems, public cloud infrastructure, and Google Earth Engine.
feature_count: Landsat harmonized multispectral bands plus QA
file_size: tile-based archive

name: MODIS Terra Surface Reflectance Daily L2G/L3
provider: NASA LP DAAC
license: NASA open data
formats: HDF-EOS, GeoTIFF/COG via services, Earthdata, GEE
access: NASA Earthdata/LP DAAC; Google Earth Engine MODIS/061/MOD09GA and related products
doi_or_citation: MODIS Terra MOD09GA v061 product DOI/citation via LP DAAC
notes: Tracks the Terra MODIS multispectral daily surface reflectance family; composited MOD09A1/MOD09Q1 variants can be treated as related products.
desc_zh: MODIS Terra MOD09 系列提供全球陆地中分辨率多光谱地表反射率，是 2000 年以来植被、火烧迹地、积雪、水体和土地覆盖监测的重要数据源。它以每日和合成产品形态发布，可通过 LP DAAC、Earthdata 与 GEE 使用。
desc_en: The MODIS Terra MOD09 family provides global moderate-resolution multispectral land surface reflectance and is a major source for vegetation, burned-area, snow, water, and land-cover monitoring since 2000. It is distributed as daily and composited products through LP DAAC, Earthdata, and Google Earth Engine.
feature_count: MODIS land reflectance bands plus QA
file_size: tile-based archive

name: MODIS Aqua Surface Reflectance Daily L2G/L3
provider: NASA LP DAAC
license: NASA open data
formats: HDF-EOS, GeoTIFF/COG via services, Earthdata, GEE
access: NASA Earthdata/LP DAAC; Google Earth Engine MODIS/061/MYD09GA and related products
doi_or_citation: MODIS Aqua MYD09GA v061 product DOI/citation via LP DAAC
notes: Aqua counterpart to Terra MOD09, useful for afternoon overpass complementarity.
desc_zh: MODIS Aqua MYD09 系列提供 Aqua 卫星下午过境的全球多光谱地表反射率，与 Terra MOD09 互补。它常用于全球和区域尺度的植被、水文、火灾和地表状态监测，并通过 LP DAAC、Earthdata 和 GEE 开放获取。
desc_en: The MODIS Aqua MYD09 family provides global multispectral surface reflectance from Aqua afternoon overpasses, complementing Terra MOD09. It is widely used for global and regional vegetation, hydrology, fire, and land-condition monitoring and is openly available through LP DAAC, Earthdata, and Google Earth Engine.
feature_count: MODIS land reflectance bands plus QA
file_size: tile-based archive

name: MODIS Nadir BRDF-Adjusted Reflectance MCD43A4
provider: NASA LP DAAC
license: NASA open data
formats: HDF-EOS, Earthdata, GEE
access: NASA Earthdata/LP DAAC; Google Earth Engine MODIS/061/MCD43A4
doi_or_citation: MODIS MCD43A4 v061 product DOI/citation via LP DAAC
notes: Daily NBAR product from combined Terra/Aqua BRDF processing; often used for consistent reflectance time series.
desc_zh: MCD43A4 是 Terra/Aqua MODIS 联合处理的 Nadir BRDF-Adjusted Reflectance 产品，提供更一致的多光谱反射率时间序列。它适合跨季节、跨区域的植被和地表覆盖分析，可通过 LP DAAC 与 GEE 获取。
desc_en: MCD43A4 is the Terra/Aqua MODIS Nadir BRDF-Adjusted Reflectance product, providing more consistent multispectral reflectance time series. It is useful for seasonal and regional vegetation and land-cover analysis and is available through LP DAAC and Google Earth Engine.
feature_count: 7 MODIS land bands plus QA
file_size: tile-based archive

name: Suomi NPP VIIRS Surface Reflectance VNP09
provider: NASA LP DAAC
license: NASA open data
formats: HDF-EOS5, Earthdata, GEE for selected collections
access: NASA Earthdata/LP DAAC; Google Earth Engine NOAA/VIIRS/001/VNP09GA
doi_or_citation: VIIRS VNP09GA v002 product DOI/citation via LP DAAC
notes: Suomi NPP VIIRS land surface reflectance; extends MODIS-like multispectral monitoring.
desc_zh: VNP09 是 Suomi NPP VIIRS 的全球陆地多光谱地表反射率产品，延续 MODIS 风格的中分辨率地表监测能力。它面向植被、火灾、雪冰、水体和土地覆盖应用，可通过 LP DAAC/Earthdata 和 GEE 等入口访问。
desc_en: VNP09 is the Suomi NPP VIIRS global land multispectral surface reflectance product, extending MODIS-like moderate-resolution land monitoring. It supports vegetation, fire, snow and ice, water, and land-cover applications through LP DAAC/Earthdata and Google Earth Engine access routes.
feature_count: VIIRS imagery and moderate-resolution reflectance bands plus QA
file_size: tile-based archive

name: NOAA-20 VIIRS Surface Reflectance VJ109
provider: NASA LP DAAC
license: NASA open data
formats: HDF-EOS5, Earthdata
access: NASA Earthdata/LP DAAC
doi_or_citation: VIIRS VJ109GA v002 product DOI/citation via LP DAAC
notes: NOAA-20 VIIRS counterpart to Suomi NPP VNP09; important for continuity and cross-platform monitoring.
desc_zh: VJ109 是 NOAA-20 VIIRS 的多光谱地表反射率产品，与 Suomi NPP VNP09 形成传感器连续性。它服务于中分辨率全球陆地监测，并通过 NASA LP DAAC/Earthdata 开放发布。
desc_en: VJ109 is the NOAA-20 VIIRS multispectral surface reflectance product and complements Suomi NPP VNP09 for sensor continuity. It supports moderate-resolution global land monitoring and is openly distributed through NASA LP DAAC/Earthdata.
feature_count: VIIRS imagery and moderate-resolution reflectance bands plus QA
file_size: tile-based archive

name: NOAA AVHRR LTDR Surface Reflectance
provider: NASA / NOAA
license: NASA/NOAA open data
formats: HDF, NetCDF/derived services, Earthdata
access: NASA Earthdata / LAADS DAAC and LTDR distribution routes
doi_or_citation: AVHRR Long Term Data Record documentation and dataset citation
notes: Long AVHRR multispectral reflectance record; useful as historical extension before MODIS.
desc_zh: AVHRR LTDR 是基于 NOAA AVHRR 的长期多光谱地表反射率/植被指数数据记录，提供早于 MODIS 的全球历史观测。它适合长期气候、植被和陆表变化研究，但空间和光谱分辨率低于 Landsat/Sentinel-2。
desc_en: AVHRR LTDR is a long-term NOAA AVHRR multispectral surface reflectance and vegetation-index data record, extending global observations back before the MODIS era. It is useful for climate, vegetation, and land-change studies, with coarser spatial and spectral resolution than Landsat or Sentinel-2.
feature_count: AVHRR visible and near-infrared reflectance record
file_size: global time-series archive

name: Sentinel-3 OLCI Level-1 EFR/ERR
provider: ESA / EUMETSAT / Copernicus
license: Copernicus free and open data policy
formats: NetCDF, SAFE, Copernicus/EUMETSAT services
access: Copernicus Data Space; EUMETSAT Data Store; CODA/DIAS routes
doi_or_citation: Sentinel-3 OLCI mission/product documentation
notes: 21-band multispectral ocean and land color instrument; not hyperspectral.
desc_zh: Sentinel-3 OLCI 是 Copernicus 的 21 波段多光谱海陆水色传感器，提供全球海洋、近岸和陆地辐射观测。Level-1 产品是水色、叶绿素、悬浮物和地表光学分析的基础输入，可通过 Copernicus 和 EUMETSAT 入口访问。
desc_en: Sentinel-3 OLCI is the Copernicus 21-band multispectral ocean and land color instrument, providing global ocean, coastal, and land radiance observations. Level-1 products are foundational inputs for water color, chlorophyll, suspended matter, and optical land analyses through Copernicus and EUMETSAT access routes.
feature_count: 21 spectral bands
file_size: scene-based archive

name: Sentinel-3 OLCI Level-2 Land and Ocean Colour Products
provider: ESA / EUMETSAT / Copernicus
theme_canonical: Ocean and land multispectral geophysical products
license: Copernicus free and open data policy
formats: NetCDF, SAFE, Copernicus/EUMETSAT services
access: Copernicus Data Space; EUMETSAT Data Store
doi_or_citation: Sentinel-3 OLCI Level-2 product documentation
notes: Accepted as a multispectral-derived official product family; separate from the L1 radiance archive. Phase v003 kept OLCI as an existing official row rather than adding a duplicate OceanColor-specific row.
desc_zh: Sentinel-3 OLCI Level-2 产品把多光谱 OLCI 观测转化为海洋水色和陆地相关地球物理变量。它适合海岸带、水质、藻华、陆地光学和大尺度环境监测，属于官方开放产品族。
desc_en: Sentinel-3 OLCI Level-2 products convert multispectral OLCI observations into ocean-color and land-related geophysical variables. They support coastal, water-quality, algal bloom, land optical, and broad environmental monitoring as part of the official open Copernicus product family.
feature_count: OLCI-derived optical/geophysical variables
file_size: scene-based archive

name: PROBA-V Collection 2 Vegetation Products
provider: ESA / VITO
license: open access with ESA/VITO terms
formats: NetCDF/HDF5/GeoTIFF depending on service, portal/API
access: PROBA-V MEP and VITO distribution services
doi_or_citation: PROBA-V Collection 2 product documentation
time_span: 2013-2021 primary mission archive; follow-on derived products vary
notes: Multispectral vegetation mission with blue, red, NIR, and SWIR channels; good bridge between SPOT-VGT and Sentinel-era vegetation products.
desc_zh: PROBA-V Collection 2 是面向全球植被监测的多光谱时间序列产品，继承 SPOT-VEGETATION 的应用生态并覆盖 Sentinel 时代之前后的过渡期。它提供蓝、红、近红外和短波红外波段，常用于植被指数、干旱和土地覆盖变化研究。
desc_en: PROBA-V Collection 2 is a multispectral time-series product family for global vegetation monitoring, continuing the SPOT-VEGETATION application lineage into the Sentinel era. It provides blue, red, near-infrared, and shortwave-infrared channels used for vegetation indices, drought analysis, and land-cover change studies.
feature_count: 4 spectral bands plus composites/indices
file_size: global time-series archive

name: USDA National Agriculture Imagery Program
provider: USDA Farm Service Agency
license: U.S. public domain/open government data
formats: GeoTIFF, COG, image services, GEE asset
access: USDA Geospatial Data Gateway; public cloud COGs; Google Earth Engine USDA/NAIP/DOQQ; Microsoft Planetary Computer STAC/Azure Blob access
doi_or_citation: USDA FSA NAIP imagery program documentation
notes: Four-band RGB/NIR aerial imagery for much of the United States; high-resolution but not global. Planetary Computer provides an additional STAC/Azure Blob access route and was verified in v020.
seen_in_passes: multispectral-v001-usda-gee-cloud; v020: refreshed Microsoft Planetary Computer STAC/Azure access evidence
desc_zh: NAIP 是 USDA 的美国农业航空影像项目，通常提供 1 米或更高空间分辨率的 RGB/NIR 四波段影像。它适合农业、土地覆盖、基础设施和变化检测研究，可通过 USDA、公共云和 GEE 使用。
desc_en: NAIP is the USDA National Agriculture Imagery Program, commonly providing four-band RGB/NIR aerial imagery at about 1 m or finer resolution across much of the United States. It supports agriculture, land-cover, infrastructure, and change-detection studies through USDA, public cloud, and Google Earth Engine access routes.
feature_count: RGB and NIR bands
file_size: state/year tile archive

name: CBERS-4 and CBERS-4A Optical Imagery
provider: INPE / China-Brazil Earth Resources Satellite Program
coverage: global/regional, strongest for Brazil and partner distribution areas
license: open data via INPE/CBERS distribution terms
formats: GeoTIFF, cloud object storage, STAC/metadata
access: INPE catalog; AWS Open Data Registry CBERS mirror
doi_or_citation: CBERS program and INPE catalog documentation
notes: Open optical multispectral archive including WFI/MUX/AWFI/WPM sensors; use official INPE catalog as provider authority and AWS as cloud mirror.
desc_zh: CBERS-4/4A 提供来自中巴地球资源卫星计划的开放光学多光谱影像，包括 WFI、MUX、AWFI、WPM 等传感器产品。该档案对南美和全球开放遥感生态很重要，可通过 INPE 目录和 AWS 开放数据镜像访问。
desc_en: CBERS-4/4A provides open optical multispectral imagery from the China-Brazil Earth Resources Satellite Program, including WFI, MUX, AWFI, WPM, and related sensors. The archive is important for South American and global open remote-sensing workflows and is accessible through INPE catalogs and an AWS Open Data mirror.
source_type: official mission archive with cloud mirror
feature_count: multiple multispectral optical sensors
file_size: scene-based archive

desc_en: Digital Earth Africa Sentinel-2 Level-2A is an Africa-wide Sentinel-2 multispectral analysis-ready product organized through Open Data Cube, STAC, and cloud object storage. It lowers the barrier to Sentinel-2 time-series analysis over Africa for agriculture, water, ecology, and urban applications.

file_size: Africa tile archive

license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 / open data terms

access: Digital Earth Africa services, STAC, S3, Sandbox
doi_or_citation: Digital Earth Africa Sentinel-2 GeoMAD product documentation

desc_zh: Digital Earth Africa Sentinel-2 GeoMAD 是基于 Sentinel-2 地表反射率生成的年度多光谱统计合成产品，包含几何中位数和中位绝对偏差等层。它适合大范围无云底图、土地覆盖和变化检测。
desc_en: Digital Earth Africa Sentinel-2 GeoMAD is an annual multispectral statistical composite derived from Sentinel-2 surface reflectance, including geometric median and median absolute deviation layers. It supports large-area cloud-reduced basemaps, land-cover mapping, and change detection.

desc_en: Digital Earth Australia Sentinel-2 NBART is an Australia-wide Sentinel-2 multispectral analysis-ready surface reflectance product with terrain and BRDF-related corrections. It supports Australian land, water, agriculture, and environmental monitoring through DEA, STAC, and cloud storage access.

desc_en: Digital Earth Australia Landsat Surface Reflectance is an Australian Landsat multispectral analysis-ready time series with radiometric, geometric, BRDF, and terrain-related processing. desc_en: The Landsat Global Land Survey is a USGS/NASA curated global Landsat collection organized around key historical epochs to support comparable multispectral land-cover baselines. It is commonly used for long-term land-cover change, global mapping, and historical reference studies.
feature_count: global epochal Landsat scene sets
file_size: epochal scene archive

doi_or_citation: NASA OceanColor / OB.DAAC mission product citations

desc_zh: NASA OceanColor/OB.DAAC 汇集 SeaWiFS、MODIS、VIIRS、MERIS、OLCI 等多光谱海洋水色任务的数据产品，覆盖全球海洋和近岸水体。它提供 Level-1/Level-2 以及更高层级产品，是叶绿素、海洋光学、水质和生物地球化学遥感的重要开放入口。
desc_en: NASA OceanColor/OB.DAAC aggregates data products from multispectral ocean-color missions such as SeaWiFS, MODIS, VIIRS, MERIS, and OLCI for global oceans and coastal waters. It provides Level-1, Level-2, and higher-level products for chlorophyll, ocean optics, water quality, and biogeochemical remote sensing.
feature_count: multi-mission ocean color products
file_size: multi-mission archive

name: JAXA GCOM-C SGLI Products
provider: Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency
license: JAXA open data terms
formats: HDF5, GeoTIFF/derived services, G-Portal
access: JAXA G-Portal registration/API/download
doi_or_citation: JAXA GCOM-C/SGLI product documentation
notes: SGLI is a multispectral imager covering near-UV to thermal infrared; accepted here for optical multispectral products, with thermal-only products out of scope.
desc_zh: GCOM-C SGLI 是 JAXA 的全球多光谱成像产品体系，覆盖陆地、海洋、冰雪和大气应用。该记录关注其可见光到短波红外等光学多光谱产品，数据通过 JAXA G-Portal 提供。
desc_en: GCOM-C SGLI is JAXA's global multispectral imaging product family for land, ocean, snow and ice, and atmospheric applications. This record focuses on its optical multispectral products from visible to shortwave infrared bands, distributed through JAXA G-Portal.
feature_count: multi-band SGLI products
file_size: global scene/tile archive

name: EUMETSAT Meteosat Third Generation FCI Level-1C
provider: EUMETSAT
coverage: Europe, Africa, Atlantic and adjacent full-disk region
license: EUMETSAT open data policy / data policy terms
formats: NetCDF, EUMETSAT Data Store/API
access: EUMETSAT Data Store and APIs
doi_or_citation: EUMETSAT MTG FCI Level 1C product documentation
notes: Geostationary multispectral imaging, not hyperspectral; useful for high-temporal-frequency cloud, atmosphere, and surface context.
desc_zh: MTG FCI Level-1C 是 EUMETSAT Meteosat 第三代灵活组合成像仪的多光谱地球静止观测产品，覆盖欧洲、非洲和大西洋邻近区域。它提供高时间分辨率多光谱观测，适合云、天气、火灾和地表背景分析。
desc_en: MTG FCI Level-1C is the EUMETSAT Meteosat Third Generation Flexible Combined Imager multispectral geostationary observation product over Europe, Africa, the Atlantic, and adjacent regions. It provides high-temporal-frequency multispectral observations for cloud, weather, fire, and surface-context analysis.
feature_count: 16 spectral channels
file_size: full-disk repeat-cycle archive

name: NOAA GOES-R ABI Level 1b Radiances and Cloud/Moisture Imagery
provider: NOAA / NASA
license: NOAA open data / public domain
formats: NetCDF, cloud object storage, GEE selected products
access: NOAA CLASS; NOAA Open Data Dissemination/AWS; Google Earth Engine NOAA/GOES/*
doi_or_citation: NOAA GOES-R ABI product documentation
notes: ABI is a 16-channel multispectral geostationary imager; include because it is open remote sensing imagery, not hyperspectral.
desc_zh: NOAA GOES-R ABI 提供美洲及周边海域的 16 通道地球静止多光谱观测，包括 Level 1b 辐射和云/水汽影像产品。它以高时间分辨率服务天气、火灾、云和环境监测，并通过 NOAA 与公共云开放发布。
desc_en: NOAA GOES-R ABI provides 16-channel geostationary multispectral observations over the Americas and adjacent oceans, including Level 1b radiances and cloud/moisture imagery products. It supports high-temporal-frequency weather, fire, cloud, and environmental monitoring through NOAA and public cloud access.
feature_count: 16 spectral channels
file_size: full-disk/CONUS/mesoscale archive

name: Himawari-8/9 AHI Full-Disk Multispectral Imagery
provider: Japan Meteorological Agency / NOAA cloud mirror
coverage: East Asia, Western Pacific, Oceania full-disk region
license: JMA/NOAA open data mirror terms
formats: NetCDF/HSD/PNG products, cloud object storage
access: JMA data services; NOAA/AWS open data mirror
doi_or_citation: JMA Himawari-8/9 AHI product documentation
notes: AHI is a 16-band geostationary multispectral imager; important for Asia-Pacific high-frequency monitoring.
desc_zh: Himawari-8/9 AHI 是覆盖东亚、西太平洋和大洋洲区域的 16 波段地球静止多光谱成像数据。它具有高时间分辨率，适合云、台风、火灾、气溶胶和地表背景监测，公共云镜像提供稳定访问线索。
desc_en: Himawari-8/9 AHI provides 16-band geostationary multispectral imagery over East Asia, the western Pacific, and Oceania. Its high temporal resolution supports cloud, typhoon, fire, aerosol, and surface-context monitoring, with public cloud mirrors providing stable access routes.
source_type: official mission product with cloud mirror
feature_count: 16 spectral bands
file_size: full-disk repeat-cycle archive

name: Planet NICFI Tropical Basemaps
provider: Planet Labs / Norway's International Climate and Forests Initiative
license: custom NICFI program terms
formats: XYZ/WMTS tiles, downloadable basemap quads, GEE access
access: Planet NICFI program registration; Google Earth Engine projects/planet-nicfi/assets/basemaps
doi_or_citation: Planet NICFI basemaps program citation/terms
notes: Not fully public-domain open data, but free programmatic access has made it a major open-access multispectral source for tropical forest monitoring. Keep access restrictions explicit.
desc_zh: Planet NICFI Tropical Basemaps 为热带森林区域提供高分辨率多光谱底图，面向森林保护、变化监测和气候相关应用。它不是公共领域数据，访问受 NICFI/Planet 条款和注册限制约束，但在开放获取遥感生态中是重要线索。
desc_en: Planet NICFI Tropical Basemaps provide high-resolution multispectral basemaps over tropical forest regions for forest protection, change monitoring, and climate-related applications. They are not public-domain data and access is governed by NICFI/Planet terms and registration, but they are an important open-access remote-sensing source.
feature_count: 4-band RGB/NIR basemaps
file_size: regional basemap archive

name: BigEarthNet-S2 v2.0 / reBEN Sentinel-2 Benchmark Archive
provider: BigEarthNet consortium / Technical University of Berlin / DFKI / Planetary Computer mirror
coverage: Europe, 10 countries in original Sentinel-2 tile selection
license: Community Data License Agreement - Permissive 1.0
formats: Zstandard archives, Sentinel-2 patch tensors/metadata, STAC/cloud mirror
access: BigEarthNet download; Zenodo/Planetary Computer discussion and cloud mirrors
doi_or_citation: Clasen et al. 2024 reBEN / BigEarthNet v2.0; Zenodo record 10891137
time_span: Sentinel-2 acquisitions from 2017-2018 in the benchmark selection
notes: Accepted as a benchmark dataset, not as a duplicate of the global Sentinel-2 archive. v2.0/refined BigEarthNet keeps Sentinel-2 multispectral patches and pairs them with Sentinel-1 for multimodal work.
desc_zh: BigEarthNet-S2 v2.0 / reBEN 是基于 Sentinel-2 多光谱影像的大规模遥感机器学习基准，面向土地覆盖、检索和多模态学习。它以欧洲多国 Sentinel-2 瓦片切成带标签 patch，并在新版中与 Sentinel-1 配对，但本目录关注其中的 Sentinel-2 多光谱部分。
desc_en: BigEarthNet-S2 v2.0 / reBEN is a large remote-sensing machine-learning benchmark built from Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery for land-cover classification, retrieval, and multimodal learning. It cuts Sentinel-2 tiles over multiple European countries into labeled patches and pairs them with Sentinel-1 in the newer benchmark, while this catalog tracks the Sentinel-2 multispectral component.
feature_count: 549,488 Sentinel-2/Sentinel-1 paired patches in v2.0; Sentinel-2 multispectral component tracked here
file_size: large patch archive

name: EuroSAT Multispectral Sentinel-2 Dataset
provider: German Aerospace Center / EuroSAT authors
license: MIT License; Sentinel data under Copernicus terms
formats: ZIP, image patches, NumPy/Hugging Face mirrors
access: Zenodo, GitHub, DFKI/EuroSAT mirrors, TensorFlow Datasets
doi_or_citation: Helber et al., EuroSAT dataset, Zenodo 7711810
time_span: Sentinel-2 source imagery era; dataset published 2018/2019 with later Zenodo record
notes: Includes a multispectral all-band version with 13 Sentinel-2 bands, distinct from the common RGB-only derivative.
desc_zh: EuroSAT 多光谱版本是基于 Sentinel-2 的土地利用/土地覆盖分类基准，包含 10 类、27000 个带标签影像 patch。与常见 RGB 版不同，多光谱版保留 13 个 Sentinel-2 波段，适合评估光谱信息对分类任务的贡献。
desc_en: The multispectral EuroSAT dataset is a Sentinel-2 land-use and land-cover classification benchmark with 27,000 labeled image patches across 10 classes. Unlike the common RGB derivative, the multispectral version preserves all 13 Sentinel-2 bands, making it useful for studying the value of spectral information in classification tasks.
feature_count: 27,000 labeled samples; 13 Sentinel-2 bands in MS version
file_size: ZIP archives

name: SEN12MS Sentinel-1/2 Multispectral Benchmark
provider: Technical University of Munich / DLR / SEN12MS authors
coverage: global inhabited land masses, all seasons
license: CC-BY-4.0 publication; Copernicus/Sentinel data terms for imagery
formats: GeoTIFF patch triplets
access: mediaTUM dataset landing page and toolbox repository
doi_or_citation: Schmitt et al. 2019, SEN12MS, ISPRS Annals
notes: Contains Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 multispectral optical patches, and MODIS land-cover labels. Accepted for the Sentinel-2 multispectral component and benchmark value.
desc_zh: SEN12MS 是全球尺度的多模态遥感基准，包含 Sentinel-1 双极化 SAR、Sentinel-2 多光谱影像和 MODIS 土地覆盖标签的配准 patch。它覆盖四季和多个陆地区域，常用于多源融合、分类和表征学习。
desc_en: SEN12MS is a global multimodal remote-sensing benchmark containing co-registered Sentinel-1 dual-polarization SAR, Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery, and MODIS land-cover labels. It spans multiple seasons and land regions and is widely used for data fusion, classification, and representation learning.
scale: 10m Sentinel-2 patches with coarser bands/data as provided
feature_count: 180,662 patch triplets
file_size: 421.3 GiB reported in paper

name: SEN12MS-CR Cloud Removal Dataset
provider: Technical University of Munich / SEN12MS-CR authors
license: CC-BY-4.0 publication; Copernicus/Sentinel data terms for imagery
formats: GeoTIFF / paired cloudy and cloud-free Sentinel-2 plus Sentinel-1 patches
access: project landing page, mediaTUM/open data mirrors
doi_or_citation: Ebel et al., Multisensor Data Fusion for Cloud Removal in Global and All-Season Sentinel-2 Imagery
time_span: Sentinel acquisitions selected for cloud removal benchmark
notes: Cloud-covered and cloud-free Sentinel-2 multispectral observations paired with Sentinel-1. Accepted as a derived benchmark, not as a canonical Sentinel-2 archive duplicate.
desc_zh: SEN12MS-CR 是面向云去除的公开多模态数据集，提供云覆盖与无云 Sentinel-2 多光谱影像，并配套 Sentinel-1 SAR 观测。它覆盖全球和多季节场景，适合训练和评估光学卫星影像云去除方法。
desc_en: SEN12MS-CR is an open multimodal cloud-removal dataset with cloudy and cloud-free Sentinel-2 multispectral observations paired with Sentinel-1 SAR measurements. It covers global and all-season scenarios and supports training and evaluation of cloud-removal methods for optical satellite imagery.
feature_count: 122,218 patch triplets reported by data.europa.eu record
file_size: large patch archive

name: SEN12MS-CR-TS Multi-Temporal Cloud Removal Dataset
provider: Technical University of Munich / SEN12MS-CR-TS authors
theme_canonical: Cloud removal multispectral time series benchmark
license: CC-BY-4.0 publication; Copernicus/Sentinel data terms for imagery
formats: time-series patches, Sentinel-1/Sentinel-2 paired data, toolbox scripts
access: GitHub/project landing page and linked data access
doi_or_citation: Ebel et al. 2022, SEN12MS-CR-TS, arXiv:2201.09613
notes: Multi-temporal extension for cloud removal. The GitHub page is accepted because it is the project landing page with data/toolbox access, not code-only.
desc_zh: SEN12MS-CR-TS 是 SEN12MS-CR 的多时相扩展，包含全球分布区域的全年 Sentinel-1 和 Sentinel-2 时间序列。它主要服务多时相、多模态云去除和光学时间序列重建研究。
desc_en: SEN12MS-CR-TS extends SEN12MS-CR into a multi-temporal dataset with year-long Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 time series over globally distributed regions. It targets multimodal and multi-temporal cloud removal and optical time-series reconstruction research.
feature_count: whole-year multimodal time series over selected ROIs
file_size: large time-series archive

name: EarthNet2021 Surface Forecasting Dataset
provider: Max Planck Institute for Biogeochemistry / EarthNet team
coverage: Europe-focused Sentinel-2 minicubes with environmental covariates
license: CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 / challenge data terms
formats: minicubes, toolkit downloads, Sentinel-2 imagery plus meteorological/topographic variables
access: EarthNet website and toolkit downloader
doi_or_citation: Requena-Mesa et al. 2021, EarthNet2021 CVPR EarthVision
time_span: Sentinel-2 time-series samples used for forecasting challenge
notes: Accepted because it packages Sentinel-2 multispectral time series with weather/topography for a named public benchmark.
desc_zh: EarthNet2021 是面向地表状态预测的 Sentinel-2 多光谱时间序列基准，把 20 米 Sentinel-2 影像、地形和中尺度气象变量组织为 minicube。它用于训练和评估地表预测、视频预测和气象条件驱动的遥感模型。
desc_en: EarthNet2021 is a Sentinel-2 multispectral time-series benchmark for Earth-surface forecasting, packaging 20 m Sentinel-2 imagery with topography and mesoscale meteorological variables into minicubes. It is used to train and evaluate surface-forecasting, video-prediction, and weather-conditioned remote-sensing models.
openness: open for research with non-commercial/share-alike terms
feature_count: about 32,000 minicubes reported by paper
file_size: large challenge archive

name: SEN2VENµS Sentinel-2 / VENµS Super-Resolution Dataset
provider: CESBIO / CNES / CNRS / INRAE / IRD / Université de Toulouse authors
license: Mixed Etalab Open Licence 2.0, CC-BY-NC-4.0, and CC-BY-4.0 by file/product
formats: PyTorch tensor files, Zenodo archives
access: Zenodo download and dataset tooling
doi_or_citation: Michel et al. 2022, Data 7(7), DOI 10.3390/data7070096; Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.6514159
time_span: paired same-day Sentinel-2 and VENµS acquisitions selected for dataset
notes: Open super-resolution benchmark using Sentinel-2 multispectral inputs and VENµS 5 m references; newer Zenodo versions should be checked in later passes.
desc_zh: SEN2VENµS 是 Sentinel-2 超分辨率训练数据集，把 Sentinel-2 10/20 米多光谱地表反射率 patch 与同日 VENµS 5 米参考影像配准。数据覆盖 29 个地点、超过 13 万个 patch，用于评估将多个 Sentinel-2 波段提升到 5 米的算法。
desc_en: SEN2VENµS is a Sentinel-2 super-resolution training dataset that pairs 10 m and 20 m Sentinel-2 multispectral surface reflectance patches with same-day 5 m VENµS reference imagery. It covers 29 locations and more than 130,000 patches for evaluating algorithms that sharpen several Sentinel-2 bands to 5 m.
feature_count: 132,955 patches reported by paper
file_size: 116 GB reported by paper

name: PASTIS Panoptic Agricultural Satellite Time Series
provider: INRAE / IGN / PASTIS authors
license: CC-BY-4.0
formats: ZIP, Sentinel-2 time-series patches, panoptic/semantic labels
access: Zenodo download and GitHub benchmark repository
doi_or_citation: Garnot et al. 2021, PASTIS / ICCV workshop benchmark; Zenodo 5012942
time_span: Sentinel-2 acquisitions between 2018-2019 for benchmark patches
notes: Accepted as a Sentinel-2 multispectral time-series benchmark with parcel-level annotations.
desc_zh: PASTIS 是法国农业地块的 Sentinel-2 多光谱时间序列基准，提供语义和实例级地块标注。它包含 2433 个 patch，每个 patch 由多时相 10 波段 Sentinel-2 数据组成，适合农业语义分割和全景分割研究。
desc_en: PASTIS is a Sentinel-2 multispectral time-series benchmark over French agricultural parcels with semantic and instance-level annotations. It contains 2,433 patches built from multi-date 10-band Sentinel-2 data and supports agricultural semantic and panoptic segmentation research.
feature_count: 2,433 patches
file_size: PASTIS.zip archive

name: BreizhCrops Sentinel-2 Crop Type Time Series
provider: Technical University of Munich / University of South Brittany / BreizhCrops authors
license: GPL-3.0 repository license; Sentinel/Copernicus data terms for imagery
formats: Python package downloads, Sentinel-2 time-series arrays, labels
access: GitHub/PyPI package and benchmark repository
doi_or_citation: Rußwurm et al. 2020, BreizhCrops, ISPRS Archives
notes: Repository is accepted because it is the maintained data access package for the benchmark, not code-only.
desc_zh: BreizhCrops 是法国布列塔尼区域的作物类型分类基准，聚合 Sentinel-2 L1C 和 L2A 时间序列及地块标签。它用于监督式作物识别和卫星时间序列方法比较，强调不规则观测和类别不平衡等真实农业遥感问题。
desc_en: BreizhCrops is a crop-type classification benchmark for Brittany, France, combining Sentinel-2 L1C and L2A time series with parcel labels. It supports supervised crop identification and satellite time-series method comparison while reflecting realistic issues such as irregular observations and class imbalance.
feature_count: crop parcel time series over Brittany
file_size: package-managed downloads

name: So2Sat LCZ42 Sentinel-1/2 Local Climate Zone Dataset
provider: Technical University of Munich / DLR / So2Sat authors
coverage: 42 cities and additional urban regions globally
license: open benchmark data via DOI 10.14459/2018mp1483140; Sentinel/Copernicus data terms for imagery
formats: HDF5, TensorFlow Datasets package, Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 patches
access: GitHub, DOI landing page, TensorFlow Datasets
doi_or_citation: Zhu et al. 2019, So2Sat LCZ42, DOI 10.14459/2018mp1483140
time_span: Sentinel-1/2 acquisitions selected for LCZ benchmark
notes: Includes Sentinel-2 10-band multispectral patches and Sentinel-1 SAR. Accepted for the Sentinel-2 optical benchmark component.
desc_zh: So2Sat LCZ42 是全球城市局地气候区分类基准，包含 Sentinel-1 SAR、Sentinel-2 多光谱光学 patch 和 LCZ 标签。其 Sentinel-2 部分提供 10 个光学波段，覆盖多大陆城市，适合城市形态、气候区和多模态分类研究。
desc_en: So2Sat LCZ42 is a global local-climate-zone benchmark containing Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 multispectral optical patches, and LCZ labels. Its Sentinel-2 component provides 10 optical bands across cities on multiple continents for urban morphology, climate-zone, and multimodal classification research.
feature_count: about 400,000 labeled patch samples
file_size: HDF5 archives

name: TreeSatAI Benchmark Archive
provider: Leibniz University Hannover / Lower Saxony forest administration / TreeSatAI authors
license: Zenodo open dataset terms / CC-BY-style attribution terms; Sentinel/Copernicus data terms for Sentinel-2
formats: Zenodo archives, aerial imagery, Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2 triplets, labels
access: Zenodo download and paper landing pages
doi_or_citation: Ahlswede et al. 2023, ESSD TreeSatAI Benchmark Archive; Zenodo 6598391
time_span: multi-sensor acquisitions synchronized for forest stand samples
notes: Accepted because it includes original Sentinel-2 multispectral data and labels for tree species benchmarking, alongside aerial and Sentinel-1 modalities.
desc_zh: TreeSatAI 是德国下萨克森森林树种识别基准，包含航空影像、Sentinel-1 和 Sentinel-2 的同步样本，以及树种标签。其 Sentinel-2 多光谱部分可用于林业分类、多源融合和跨分辨率研究。
desc_en: TreeSatAI is a forest tree-species benchmark over Lower Saxony, Germany, containing synchronized aerial imagery, Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2 data, and tree-species labels. Its Sentinel-2 multispectral component supports forestry classification, multisensor fusion, and cross-resolution studies.
feature_count: 50,381 image triplets
file_size: Zenodo archive

name: DynamicEarthNet Daily Multi-Spectral Change Dataset
provider: Technical University of Munich / NVIDIA / DynamicEarthNet authors
license: mediaTUM/DynamicEarthNet research data terms; Planet imagery terms apply
formats: Planet Fusion multispectral time series, labels, mediaTUM/Hugging Face mirrors
access: CodaLab/mediaTUM/Hugging Face dataset access
doi_or_citation: Toker et al. 2022, DynamicEarthNet, CVPR
time_span: daily observations over selected AOIs, product-dependent
notes: Uses daily Planet multispectral imagery and semantic labels; not fully public-domain but distributed for benchmark use. Keep access restrictions explicit.
desc_zh: DynamicEarthNet 是每日多光谱语义变化分割数据集，包含全球 75 个 AOI 的 Planet 多光谱时间序列和逐像素语义标签。它面向高频土地利用变化、时序建模和语义变化检测，访问通常通过比赛/仓库入口完成。
desc_en: DynamicEarthNet is a daily multispectral semantic change segmentation dataset with Planet multispectral time series and pixel-level semantic labels over 75 global AOIs. It targets high-frequency land-use change, temporal modeling, and semantic change detection, with access generally routed through competition or repository portals.
scale: daily Planet multispectral imagery, about 3m product-dependent
feature_count: 75 AOIs with monthly labels and daily observations
file_size: large benchmark archive

name: SpaceNet 6 Multi-Sensor All Weather Mapping Dataset
provider: SpaceNet LLC / Capella Space / Maxar / AWS Open Data
license: CC-BY-SA-4.0
formats: GeoTIFF, SAR/EO imagery, building labels, AWS S3
access: AWS Open Data Registry SpaceNet bucket and challenge pages
doi_or_citation: SpaceNet 6 Multi-Sensor All Weather Mapping dataset release/challenge documentation
time_span: challenge dataset acquisitions around Rotterdam, product-dependent
notes: Includes Maxar WorldView-2 electro-optical multispectral imagery and Capella SAR. Accepted for the optical multispectral component and open benchmark labels.
desc_zh: SpaceNet 6 是鹿特丹港区的多传感器建筑制图基准，组合 Capella SAR 与 Maxar WorldView-2 光学多光谱影像。它提供开放许可的影像和建筑标签，适合高分辨率多光谱目标提取与多源融合研究。
desc_en: SpaceNet 6 is a multisensor building-mapping benchmark over the Port of Rotterdam, combining Capella SAR with Maxar WorldView-2 electro-optical multispectral imagery. It provides openly licensed imagery and building labels for high-resolution multispectral object extraction and multisensor fusion research.
feature_count: 48,000+ building footprint labels reported for SpaceNet 6
file_size: AWS S3 challenge archive

name: SpaceNet 7 Multi-Temporal Urban Development Dataset
provider: SpaceNet LLC / Planet Labs / AWS Open Data
license: SpaceNet open data terms / CC-BY-SA-style challenge terms
formats: Planet monthly basemaps, labels, STAC, AWS S3
access: Planet STAC catalog and SpaceNet AWS bucket
doi_or_citation: SpaceNet 7 Multi-Temporal Urban Development Challenge dataset documentation
time_span: monthly basemaps over about two years
notes: Planet basemaps provide multi-temporal multispectral imagery for urban development mapping. Track as a benchmark dataset with custom SpaceNet/Planet terms.
desc_zh: SpaceNet 7 是多时相城市发展基准，使用 Planet 月度多光谱底图和建筑标注来研究城市变化。它通过 SpaceNet/AWS 和 Planet STAC 入口开放给研究与竞赛使用，适合高分辨率多时相变化检测。
desc_en: SpaceNet 7 is a multi-temporal urban development benchmark using Planet monthly multispectral basemaps and building annotations to study urban change. It is exposed through SpaceNet/AWS and Planet STAC routes for research and challenge use, supporting high-resolution multi-temporal change detection.
feature_count: monthly basemaps and building labels over multiple AOIs
file_size: AWS/STAC archive

name: Onera Satellite Change Detection Dataset
provider: ONERA / OSCD authors
coverage: 24 locations across Brazil, USA, Europe, Middle East, and Asia
license: open research dataset; Copernicus/Sentinel data terms for imagery
formats: 13-band Sentinel-2 image pairs, PNG masks, download archives
access: project landing page and mirrored packages
doi_or_citation: Daudt et al. 2018, Urban Change Detection for Multispectral Earth Observation Using CNNs
notes: Small but widely reused benchmark with 13-band Sentinel-2 image pairs and manually annotated urban change masks.
desc_zh: OSCD 是 ONERA 发布的 Sentinel-2 多光谱变化检测基准，包含全球 24 个地点的 13 波段影像对和人工变化标注。它常用于城市变化检测、孪生网络和多光谱输入通道消融实验。
desc_en: OSCD is an ONERA Sentinel-2 multispectral change-detection benchmark containing 13-band image pairs and manual change annotations for 24 locations worldwide. It is widely used for urban change detection, Siamese networks, and studies of multispectral input-channel choices.
feature_count: 24 registered image pairs
file_size: small benchmark archive

name: Sentinel-2 Cloud Mask Catalogue
provider: University College London / Sentinel-2 Cloud Mask Catalogue authors
license: CC-BY-4.0
formats: Zenodo archives, Sentinel-2 subscenes, cloud masks, shapefiles
access: Zenodo download
doi_or_citation: Francis et al. 2020, Sentinel-2 Cloud Mask Catalogue, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.4172871
notes: Cloud-mask benchmark built from Sentinel-2 L1C subscenes. Accepted for multispectral cloud detection/quality-mask research.
desc_zh: Sentinel-2 Cloud Mask Catalogue 提供 513 个 Sentinel-2 Level-1C 多光谱子场景及人工/参考云掩膜，子场景大小为 1022×1022 像素、20 米采样。它用于云检测算法训练、验证和质量掩膜比较。
desc_en: The Sentinel-2 Cloud Mask Catalogue provides 513 Sentinel-2 Level-1C multispectral subscenes and reference cloud masks, sampled as 1022-by-1022 pixel scenes at 20 m. It supports cloud-detection training, validation, and comparison of quality-mask algorithms.
feature_count: 513 subscenes
file_size: Zenodo archive

name: Landsat to Sentinel-2 (LS2S2) Fusion Dataset
provider: CESBIO / Evoland Land Monitoring Evolution authors
coverage: Europe plus selected West Africa and northern South America AOIs
license: Zenodo open dataset terms; Landsat/Sentinel source data terms apply
formats: Zenodo archives, Sentinel-2 and Landsat time-series tensors/arrays
access: Zenodo download and companion repository
doi_or_citation: Michel 2025, Landsat to Sentinel-2 (LS2S2), DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15471890
notes: Newer fusion benchmark with joint Sentinel-2 and Landsat-8/9 time series. Accepted as paper/repository-backed open dataset.
desc_zh: LS2S2 是用于 Landsat 与 Sentinel-2 时序融合的多光谱数据集，包含 2022 年 Sentinel-2、Landsat-8 和 Landsat-9 联合影像时间序列。它覆盖欧洲及少量非洲和南美区域 AOI，适合跨传感器融合、补全和分辨率转换研究。
desc_en: LS2S2 is a multispectral dataset for Landsat and Sentinel-2 time-series fusion, containing joint Sentinel-2, Landsat-8, and Landsat-9 satellite image time series for 2022. It covers European AOIs plus selected regions in West Africa and northern South America for cross-sensor fusion, gap filling, and resolution-transfer studies.
feature_count: 64 training AOIs and 41 testing AOIs reported by Zenodo record
file_size: Zenodo archive

name: Nimbus-7 CZCS Level-2 Ocean Color Data
provider: NASA Ocean Biology Distributed Active Archive Center
license: NASA open data
formats: NetCDF/HDF-derived OB.DAAC products, Earthdata/OB.DAAC services
access: NASA Earthdata Search, CMR, OB.DAAC direct-download/API services
doi_or_citation: Nimbus-7 CZCS Level-2 Regional Ocean Color (OC) Data, version 2022.0, CMR concept C3300838564-OB_CLOUD
notes: Historical Coastal Zone Color Scanner multispectral ocean-color record; accepted as a product-level split from the broad NASA OceanColor archive.
desc_zh: Nimbus-7 CZCS Level-2 Ocean Color Data 是 NASA 早期海洋水色多光谱数据记录，来自 Coastal Zone Color Scanner。它为 1970 至 1980 年代的海洋叶绿素、水色和水体光学研究提供历史基线，并通过 OB.DAAC/Earthdata 开放访问。
desc_en: Nimbus-7 CZCS Level-2 Ocean Color Data is an early NASA multispectral ocean-color record from the Coastal Zone Color Scanner. It provides a historical baseline for chlorophyll, ocean color, and water-optics studies in the late 1970s and 1980s and is openly accessible through OB.DAAC/Earthdata.
feature_count: CZCS ocean-color spectral bands and Level-2 OC variables
file_size: mission product archive

name: OrbView-2 SeaWiFS Level-2 Ocean Color Data
provider: NASA Ocean Biology Distributed Active Archive Center
license: NASA open data
formats: NetCDF/HDF-derived OB.DAAC products, Earthdata/OB.DAAC services
access: NASA Earthdata Search, CMR, OB.DAAC direct-download/API services
doi_or_citation: OrbView-2 SeaWiFS Level-2 Regional Global Area Coverage Ocean Color Data, version 2022.0, CMR concept C2789774382-OB_CLOUD
notes: Primary URL tracks the GAC OC product; MLAC OC concept C3198658688-OB_CLOUD is recorded in evidence as the local-area counterpart.
desc_zh: SeaWiFS Level-2 Ocean Color Data 是 OrbView-2 SeaWiFS 的多光谱海洋水色产品，是全球叶绿素和海洋生物地球化学遥感的经典长期记录。GAC 与 MLAC 产品提供不同覆盖/分辨率取向，可通过 NASA OB.DAAC 与 CMR 获取。
desc_en: SeaWiFS Level-2 Ocean Color Data is the OrbView-2 SeaWiFS multispectral ocean-color product and a classic long-term record for global chlorophyll and ocean biogeochemistry remote sensing. GAC and MLAC variants support different coverage and resolution needs and are distributed through NASA OB.DAAC and CMR.
scale: about 1km GAC, finer local-area products mission-dependent
feature_count: SeaWiFS ocean-color spectral bands and Level-2 OC variables
file_size: mission product archive

name: Aqua MODIS Level-2 Ocean Color Data
provider: NASA Ocean Biology Distributed Active Archive Center
license: NASA open data
formats: NetCDF, OB.DAAC products, Earthdata/OB.DAAC services
access: NASA Earthdata Search, CMR, OB.DAAC direct-download/API services
doi_or_citation: Aqua MODIS Level-2 Regional Ocean Color Data, version 2022.0, CMR concept C3380708980-OB_CLOUD
notes: Product-level ocean-color split for Aqua MODIS; complements the land-surface MODIS reflectance rows in v001.
desc_zh: Aqua MODIS Level-2 Ocean Color Data 是 NASA Aqua/MODIS 的多光谱海洋水色产品，提供叶绿素、遥感反射率和相关海洋光学变量。它是 2002 年以来全球水色、生态和生物地球化学研究的核心开放数据源。
desc_en: Aqua MODIS Level-2 Ocean Color Data is the NASA Aqua/MODIS multispectral ocean-color product, providing chlorophyll, remote-sensing reflectance, and related ocean-optical variables. It is a core open data source for global ocean color, ecology, and biogeochemistry studies since 2002.
scale: about 1km Level-2 ocean-color product, band/product dependent
feature_count: MODIS ocean-color spectral bands and Level-2 OC variables
file_size: mission product archive

name: Terra MODIS Level-2 Ocean Color Data
provider: NASA Ocean Biology Distributed Active Archive Center
license: NASA open data
formats: NetCDF, OB.DAAC products, Earthdata/OB.DAAC services
access: NASA Earthdata Search, CMR, OB.DAAC direct-download/API services
doi_or_citation: Terra MODIS Level-2 Regional Ocean Color Data, version 2022.0, CMR concept C3384236979-OB_CLOUD
notes: Terra MODIS ocean-color product; distinct overpass record from Aqua MODIS.
desc_zh: Terra MODIS Level-2 Ocean Color Data 是 Terra/MODIS 的多光谱海洋水色产品，与 Aqua/MODIS 形成不同过境时间的长期记录。它提供海洋光学和生物地球化学变量，可用于跨平台一致性分析和长期水色监测。
desc_en: Terra MODIS Level-2 Ocean Color Data is the Terra/MODIS multispectral ocean-color product, complementing Aqua/MODIS with a different overpass record. It provides ocean-optical and biogeochemical variables for cross-platform consistency analysis and long-term water-color monitoring.
scale: about 1km Level-2 ocean-color product, band/product dependent
feature_count: MODIS ocean-color spectral bands and Level-2 OC variables
file_size: mission product archive

name: Suomi-NPP VIIRS Level-2 Ocean Color Data
provider: NASA Ocean Biology Distributed Active Archive Center / NOAA JPSS
license: NASA/NOAA open data
formats: NetCDF, OB.DAAC products, Earthdata/OB.DAAC services
access: NASA Earthdata Search, CMR, OB.DAAC direct-download/API services
doi_or_citation: Suomi-NPP VIIRS Level-2 Regional Ocean Color Data, version 2022.0, CMR concept C3388381264-OB_CLOUD
notes: VIIRS ocean-color continuation of the MODIS/SeaWiFS lineage, separate from the VIIRS land surface reflectance row.
desc_zh: Suomi-NPP VIIRS Level-2 Ocean Color Data 是 VIIRS 的全球多光谱海洋水色产品，延续 SeaWiFS 和 MODIS 之后的开放水色观测能力。它提供叶绿素、遥感反射率和海洋光学变量，服务海洋生态、水质和气候监测。
desc_en: Suomi-NPP VIIRS Level-2 Ocean Color Data is a global VIIRS multispectral ocean-color product that continues the open water-color observing lineage after SeaWiFS and MODIS. It provides chlorophyll, remote-sensing reflectance, and ocean-optical variables for marine ecology, water quality, and climate monitoring.
feature_count: VIIRS ocean-color spectral bands and Level-2 OC variables
file_size: mission product archive

name: NOAA-20 VIIRS Level-2 Ocean Color Data
provider: NASA Ocean Biology Distributed Active Archive Center / NOAA JPSS
license: NASA/NOAA open data
formats: NetCDF, OB.DAAC products, Earthdata/OB.DAAC services
access: NASA Earthdata Search, CMR, OB.DAAC direct-download/API services
doi_or_citation: NOAA-20 VIIRS Level-2 Regional Ocean Color Data, version 2022.0, CMR concept C3396928899-OB_CLOUD
notes: NOAA-20/JPSS-1 VIIRS ocean-color product for continuity with Suomi-NPP VIIRS.
desc_zh: NOAA-20 VIIRS Level-2 Ocean Color Data 是 JPSS-1/NOAA-20 VIIRS 的多光谱海洋水色产品，为 Suomi-NPP VIIRS 之后的连续观测提供支撑。它适合跨传感器水色时间序列、生态监测和近实时海洋应用。
desc_en: NOAA-20 VIIRS Level-2 Ocean Color Data is the JPSS-1/NOAA-20 VIIRS multispectral ocean-color product, supporting continuity after Suomi-NPP VIIRS. It is useful for cross-sensor water-color time series, ecological monitoring, and near-real-time ocean applications.
feature_count: VIIRS ocean-color spectral bands and Level-2 OC variables
file_size: mission product archive

name: ENVISAT MERIS Level-2 Ocean Color Data
provider: NASA OB.DAAC / ESA ENVISAT MERIS mission archive
license: NASA open data / ESA mission data terms
formats: NetCDF/HDF-derived OB.DAAC products, Earthdata/OB.DAAC services
access: NASA Earthdata Search, CMR, OB.DAAC direct-download/API services
doi_or_citation: ENVISAT MERIS Level-2 Regional Full Resolution, Full Swath Ocean Color Data, version 2022.0, CMR concept C3281778845-OB_CLOUD
notes: Primary URL tracks MERIS full-resolution full-swath OC; reduced-resolution OC concept C3281778850-OB_CLOUD is recorded in evidence.
desc_zh: ENVISAT MERIS Level-2 Ocean Color Data 是 MERIS 传感器的多光谱海洋水色产品，连接 SeaWiFS/MODIS 与 Sentinel-3 OLCI 时代。它包含全分辨率和降分辨率产品，可通过 NASA OB.DAAC 的再处理档案访问。
desc_en: ENVISAT MERIS Level-2 Ocean Color Data is the MERIS multispectral ocean-color product, bridging the SeaWiFS/MODIS era and the Sentinel-3 OLCI era. It includes full-resolution and reduced-resolution products distributed through NASA OB.DAAC reprocessed archives.
feature_count: MERIS ocean-color spectral bands and Level-2 OC variables
file_size: mission product archive

name: COMS GOCI Level-2 Ocean Color Data
provider: NASA OB.DAAC / Korea Ocean Satellite Center / KIOST
coverage: Northeast Asia and western Pacific regional disk
license: NASA open data / KOSC data terms for source mission
formats: NetCDF/HDF-derived OB.DAAC products, Earthdata/OB.DAAC services
access: NASA Earthdata Search, CMR, OB.DAAC direct-download/API services; KOSC mission portal
doi_or_citation: COMS GOCI Level-2 Regional Ocean Color Data, version 2014.0, CMR concept C3558858528-OB_CLOUD
notes: First geostationary ocean-color mission product in this catalog. Accepted as a regional multispectral ocean-color record, not a weather-imager product.
desc_zh: COMS GOCI Level-2 Ocean Color Data 是韩国地球静止海洋水色成像仪的区域多光谱水色产品，覆盖东北亚和西太平洋邻近海域。它提供高时间分辨率水色观测，适合近岸水质、藻华和悬浮物监测。
desc_en: COMS GOCI Level-2 Ocean Color Data is a regional multispectral ocean-color product from the Korean geostationary ocean color imager over Northeast Asia and the adjacent western Pacific. It provides high-temporal-resolution water-color observations for coastal water quality, algal bloom, and suspended-matter monitoring.
feature_count: GOCI multispectral ocean-color bands and Level-2 OC variables
file_size: mission product archive

name: ESA Ocean Colour Climate Change Initiative Products
provider: European Space Agency Climate Change Initiative / Plymouth Marine Laboratory and partners
theme_canonical: Multi-sensor ocean color climate data record
license: ESA CCI open data terms / citation required
formats: NetCDF, gridded Level-3 products, portal/API downloads
access: ESA CCI Open Data Portal, OceanColour.org product portal, CEDA archive routes
doi_or_citation: ESA Ocean Colour CCI product documentation and recommended dataset citations, product version dependent
notes: Multi-sensor climate data record derived from SeaWiFS, MODIS, MERIS, VIIRS, OLCI and related ocean-color missions. Accepted as an official fused climate product rather than a mission duplicate.
desc_zh: ESA Ocean Colour CCI 产品把多个多光谱海洋水色任务融合成全球气候数据记录，面向长期叶绿素、遥感反射率和水色变量分析。它强调跨传感器一致性和气候质量控制，是水色气候研究的重要开放产品。
desc_en: ESA Ocean Colour CCI products fuse multiple multispectral ocean-color missions into global climate data records for long-term chlorophyll, remote-sensing reflectance, and water-color variables. They emphasize cross-sensor consistency and climate-quality control and are important open products for ocean-color climate research.
feature_count: multi-sensor chlorophyll, remote-sensing reflectance, and ocean-colour variables
file_size: global climate record archive

name: Copernicus Marine Global Ocean Colour L3/L4 Products
provider: Copernicus Marine Service / Mercator Ocean International / ACRI-ST and partners
license: Copernicus Marine free and open data policy / service terms
formats: NetCDF, OPeNDAP/subsetter/API, catalogue metadata
access: Copernicus Marine Data Store and APIs
doi_or_citation: Copernicus Marine OCEANCOLOUR_GLO_BGC_L3_MY_009_103 and related L4 products, product documentation
notes: Operational multi-sensor gridded ocean-colour products; L4 product page is recorded in evidence. Accepted as service-level fused product family.
desc_zh: Copernicus Marine Global Ocean Colour L3/L4 产品提供多传感器融合的全球海洋水色生物地球化学变量，包括叶绿素、遥感反射率和透明度等。它通过 Copernicus Marine Data Store 和 API 开放，适合业务监测、模型同化和长期分析。
desc_en: Copernicus Marine Global Ocean Colour L3/L4 products provide multi-sensor fused global ocean-colour biogeochemical variables, including chlorophyll, remote-sensing reflectance, and transparency-related fields. They are openly distributed through the Copernicus Marine Data Store and APIs for operational monitoring, model assimilation, and long-term analysis.
feature_count: global L3/L4 ocean-colour variables
file_size: global operational archive

name: Landsat Collection 2 U.S. Analysis Ready Data
provider: U.S. Geological Survey
coverage: United States, including conterminous U.S., Alaska and Hawaii tiles as supported
license: public domain / USGS open data
formats: GeoTIFF tiles, surface reflectance, top-of-atmosphere reflectance, QA, metadata
access: USGS EarthExplorer, bulk download routes, USGS Landsat product pages
doi_or_citation: USGS Landsat Collection 2 U.S. Analysis Ready Data product documentation
notes: CEOS Analysis Ready Data style tiled Landsat product; accepted as a U.S.-specific ARD product distinct from global scene-based Landsat Collection 2.
desc_zh: Landsat Collection 2 U.S. Analysis Ready Data 是 USGS 面向美国区域发布的 Landsat 多光谱分析就绪瓦片产品。它把 Landsat 4-9 的反射率、亮温和质量层组织到固定投影网格中，便于跨时相堆叠和变化分析。
desc_en: Landsat Collection 2 U.S. Analysis Ready Data is the USGS U.S.-focused Landsat multispectral analysis-ready tiled product. It organizes Landsat 4-9 reflectance, brightness temperature, and quality layers on a fixed projection grid, supporting time-series stacking and change analysis with less preprocessing.
feature_count: Landsat 4-9 ARD tile archive
file_size: national tiled archive

name: GLAD Landsat Analysis Ready Data
provider: University of Maryland GLAD / Global Land Analysis and Discovery
license: free public research data; Landsat source data under USGS open policy
formats: GeoTIFF 16-day composites, 8-band normalized surface reflectance and brightness temperature
access: GLAD ARD web portal and download tools
doi_or_citation: Potapov et al. / GLAD Landsat ARD documentation and tools
notes: GLAD ARD is a global 16-day Landsat time-series ARD/composite archive. It is accepted as a derived global ARD product, not a replacement for USGS canonical Landsat products.
desc_zh: GLAD Landsat ARD 是马里兰大学 GLAD 团队构建的全球 Landsat 分析就绪时间序列，以 16 天间隔组织多光谱归一化地表反射率和亮温等层。它适合森林、土地覆盖和长期变化监测，是 USGS Landsat 之外常用的派生开放产品。
desc_en: GLAD Landsat ARD is a global Landsat analysis-ready time-series archive from the University of Maryland GLAD team, organizing multispectral normalized surface reflectance and brightness temperature layers into 16-day intervals. It is widely used for forest, land-cover, and long-term change monitoring as a derived open product built from USGS Landsat data.
feature_count: 8-band 16-day Landsat ARD composites
file_size: global 16-day time-series archive

name: Digital Earth Africa Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 Surface Reflectance
provider: Digital Earth Africa / USGS
theme_raw: DE Africa Landsat C2 L2 SR
license: CC-BY-4.0 for DE Africa services; USGS open data for Landsat source products
formats: COG, Open Data Cube products, S3, ODC API
access: DE Africa Sandbox/ODC API, AWS Open Data Registry, product specification pages
doi_or_citation: Digital Earth Africa Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 Surface Reflectance product documentation
notes: Distinct regional ARD package over Africa, indexed into the DE Africa Open Data Cube and cloud services.
desc_zh: Digital Earth Africa Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 Surface Reflectance 是覆盖非洲的 Landsat 多光谱地表反射率分析就绪产品。它把 USGS Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 数据组织进 DE Africa 的 Open Data Cube 和云端访问体系，适合长期非洲陆表变化分析。
desc_en: Digital Earth Africa Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 Surface Reflectance is an Africa-wide Landsat multispectral surface reflectance analysis-ready product. It organizes USGS Landsat Collection 2 Level-2 data into DE Africa Open Data Cube and cloud access systems for long-term African land-surface change analysis.
feature_count: Landsat 5/7/8/9 surface reflectance bands and QA layers over Africa
file_size: Africa tile archive

name: Digital Earth Africa Landsat GeoMAD
provider: Digital Earth Africa
license: CC-BY-4.0 / DE Africa open data terms
formats: COG, Open Data Cube products, S3, annual geomedian and MAD layers
access: DE Africa Explorer/Sandbox/ODC API, AWS Marketplace/Open Data routes
doi_or_citation: Digital Earth Africa GeoMAD product documentation
time_span: 1984-present, with archive/product periods varying by Landsat sensor
notes: Accepted as the Landsat component of DE Africa GeoMAD. The v001 Sentinel-2 GeoMAD row remains separate for the Sentinel-2 product family.
desc_zh: Digital Earth Africa Landsat GeoMAD 是基于 Landsat 地表反射率生成的非洲年度云少多光谱合成产品，包含几何中位数和中位绝对偏差层。它为非洲长期土地覆盖、烧毁迹地、农田和生态变化监测提供稳健底图。
desc_en: Digital Earth Africa Landsat GeoMAD is an annual cloud-reduced multispectral composite over Africa derived from Landsat surface reflectance, including geomedian and median absolute deviation layers. It provides robust basemaps for long-term African land-cover, burned-area, agriculture, and ecological change monitoring.
feature_count: Landsat geomedian bands plus three MAD measures
file_size: Africa annual composite archive

name: Digital Earth Australia Geometric Median and Median Absolute Deviation (Landsat)
provider: Geoscience Australia / Digital Earth Australia
license: CC-BY-4.0
formats: COG/Open Data Cube products, DEA Maps, GEE mirror, product metadata
access: DEA Knowledge Hub, DEA Maps/ODC, Google Earth Engine mirror
doi_or_citation: Geoscience Australia DEA Geometric Median and Median Absolute Deviation product documentation
time_span: annual products over Landsat archive, product-version dependent
notes: Accepted as an official Australian Landsat multispectral geomedian/MAD composite, distinct from DEA surface reflectance rows.
desc_zh: Digital Earth Australia GeoMAD Landsat 产品把澳大利亚 Landsat 多光谱时间序列压缩为年度几何中位数和中位绝对偏差层。它提供低云、低噪的年度地表代表影像，用于土地覆盖、烧毁迹地、城市扩张和自然资源变化监测。
desc_en: Digital Earth Australia GeoMAD Landsat products compress Australian Landsat multispectral time series into annual geometric median and median absolute deviation layers. They provide low-cloud, low-noise annual representations for land-cover, burned-area, urban expansion, and natural-resource change monitoring.
feature_count: annual Landsat geomedian and MAD bands over Australia
file_size: Australia annual composite archive

name: Digital Earth Pacific Sentinel-2 GeoMAD
provider: Digital Earth Pacific / Pacific Community / AWS Open Data
license: open data via AWS Open Data / Digital Earth Pacific terms
formats: COG, S3, annual Sentinel-2 geomedian and absolute deviation layers
access: AWS Open Data Registry, Digital Earth Pacific data-access documentation
doi_or_citation: Digital Earth Pacific Sentinel-2 Geometric Median and Absolute Deviations AWS Open Data Registry record
notes: Accepted as a Pacific regional decision-ready Sentinel-2 composite with its own cloud product boundary.
desc_zh: Digital Earth Pacific Sentinel-2 GeoMAD 是覆盖太平洋岛屿区域的年度多光谱几何中位数与绝对偏差合成产品。它从 Sentinel-2 地表反射率中生成云少的代表性影像，用于岛屿环境变化、灾害和气候适应相关分析。
desc_en: Digital Earth Pacific Sentinel-2 GeoMAD is an annual multispectral geomedian and absolute deviation composite over Pacific Island countries and territories. It derives cloud-reduced representative imagery from Sentinel-2 surface reflectance for island environmental change, disaster, and climate-adaptation analyses.
feature_count: Sentinel-2 annual GeoMAD bands over Pacific islands
file_size: Pacific annual composite archive

name: Digital Earth Pacific Landsat GeoMAD
provider: Digital Earth Pacific / Pacific Community / AWS Open Data
license: open data via AWS Open Data / Digital Earth Pacific terms
formats: COG, S3, annual Landsat geomedian and absolute deviation layers
access: AWS Open Data Registry, Digital Earth Pacific data-access documentation
doi_or_citation: Digital Earth Pacific Landsat Geometric Median and Absolute Deviations AWS Open Data Registry record
notes: Accepted as the Landsat counterpart to Digital Earth Pacific Sentinel-2 GeoMAD, supporting longer historical time series.
desc_zh: Digital Earth Pacific Landsat GeoMAD 是覆盖太平洋岛屿区域的 Landsat 年度云少合成产品，包含几何中位数与绝对偏差层。它利用 Landsat 较长历史记录，为海岸、植被、土地覆盖和灾害变化分析提供多光谱基线。
desc_en: Digital Earth Pacific Landsat GeoMAD is an annual cloud-reduced Landsat composite over Pacific Island countries and territories, including geometric median and absolute deviation layers. It uses the longer Landsat record to provide multispectral baselines for coastal, vegetation, land-cover, and disaster-change analyses.
feature_count: Landsat annual GeoMAD bands over Pacific islands
file_size: Pacific annual composite archive

name: Brazil Data Cube Earth Observation Data Cubes
provider: INPE / Brazil Data Cube
license: open data via Brazil Data Cube / AWS Open Data terms
formats: COG, STAC, data cube collections, CBERS, Sentinel-2 and Landsat ARD/composites
access: INPE STAC server, Brazil Data Cube services, AWS Open Data Registry
doi_or_citation: Ferreira et al. 2020 and Brazil Data Cube documentation; AWS Open Data Registry record
notes: Accepted as a national data-cube product family because BDC publishes named data cube collections produced from CBERS-4, Sentinel-2, and Landsat ARD over Brazil.
desc_zh: Brazil Data Cube Earth Observation Data Cubes 是 INPE 面向巴西构建的开放多光谱数据立方体产品族，基于 CBERS-4、Sentinel-2 和 Landsat 的分析就绪数据生成规则时间序列。它通过 STAC、AWS 开放数据和 BDC 服务发布，支持巴西国土监测和应用开发。
desc_en: Brazil Data Cube Earth Observation Data Cubes are an open multispectral data-cube product family from INPE for Brazil, generated from analysis-ready CBERS-4, Sentinel-2, and Landsat imagery into regular time series. They are distributed through STAC, AWS Open Data, and BDC services for national monitoring and application development.
feature_count: CBERS, Sentinel-2 and Landsat data cube collections over Brazil
file_size: Brazil national cube archive

name: Swiss Data Cube Analysis Ready Data Archive
provider: UNEP/GRID-Geneva / University of Geneva / Swiss Data Cube partners
license: open and free source EO data with Swiss Data Cube access terms
formats: Open Data Cube, Landsat and Sentinel-2 ARD, derived cloud-free products
access: Swiss Data Cube platform, Open Data Cube tooling, project repository and publications
doi_or_citation: Giuliani et al. 2021 Scientific Data, Swiss Data Cube analysis-ready data archive
time_span: 1984-present for Landsat, Sentinel-2 era added, product-dependent
notes: Accepted as a national analysis-ready data cube with documented Landsat and Sentinel-2 ARD over Switzerland. Access may be platform-mediated rather than bulk public cloud download, so this is marked open with platform terms.
desc_zh: Swiss Data Cube Analysis Ready Data Archive 是瑞士国家尺度的地球观测数据立方体，组织 Landsat 和 Sentinel-2 多光谱分析就绪数据以支持环境监测。它通过 Open Data Cube 技术和 SDC 平台提供一致校准、空间配准的时间序列，并有 Scientific Data 数据描述论文支撑。
desc_en: Swiss Data Cube Analysis Ready Data Archive is a national Earth-observation data cube for Switzerland that organizes Landsat and Sentinel-2 multispectral analysis-ready data for environmental monitoring. Built with Open Data Cube technology and documented in Scientific Data, it provides consistently calibrated and co-registered time series through the SDC platform.
feature_count: national Landsat/Sentinel-2 ARD archive over Switzerland
file_size: national data cube archive

name: CloudSEN12 Sentinel-2 Cloud Semantic Understanding Dataset
provider: CloudSEN12 authors / University of Valencia and collaborators
license: CC-BY-4.0 or repository-stated open dataset terms; Copernicus source data terms apply
formats: Sentinel-2 multispectral patches, cloud/cloud-shadow labels, Zenodo archives
access: Zenodo download and project repository
doi_or_citation: Aybar et al. 2022, CloudSEN12, Scientific Data; Zenodo record 7034410
time_span: Sentinel-2 acquisitions sampled for global cloud semantic benchmark
notes: Accepted as a cloud/cloud-shadow benchmark with Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery and labels, not merely a cloud-mask product.
desc_zh: CloudSEN12 是面向云、薄云和阴影语义理解的 Sentinel-2 多光谱公开数据集，包含全球采样场景、光谱影像和人工/专家标注。它适合训练和评估云检测、阴影检测和质量掩膜算法，是 Sentinel-2 预处理工作流的重要基准。
desc_en: CloudSEN12 is an open Sentinel-2 multispectral dataset for semantic understanding of clouds, thin clouds, and shadows, with globally sampled scenes, spectral imagery, and expert annotations. It supports training and evaluation of cloud detection, shadow detection, and quality-mask algorithms for Sentinel-2 preprocessing workflows.
feature_count: 49,400 image patches reported by dataset paper
file_size: about 1 TB dataset archive

name: CloudSEN12+ Global Cloud and Cloud Shadow Dataset
provider: CloudSEN12+ authors / IPL-UV and collaborators
license: CC0-1.0 for CloudSEN12+ Hugging Face release; Copernicus source data terms apply
formats: Sentinel-2 multispectral patches, cloud/shadow masks, labels
access: ScienceDB / project download routes and repository documentation
doi_or_citation: Aybar et al. 2024, CloudSEN12+, Data in Brief; Hugging Face tacofoundation/cloudsen12
time_span: Sentinel-2 scenes sampled globally, product version dependent
notes: Accepted as the expanded CloudSEN12+ benchmark; distinct from CloudSEN12 because it has a larger/updated product boundary and labeling design.
desc_zh: CloudSEN12+ 是 CloudSEN12 的扩展版全球 Sentinel-2 云与云阴影数据集，面向更全面的云语义分割和质量控制研究。它提供多光谱影像 patch 与云/阴影标注，可用于评估复杂大气条件下的 Sentinel-2 掩膜算法。
desc_en: CloudSEN12+ is an expanded global Sentinel-2 cloud and cloud-shadow dataset for richer cloud semantic segmentation and quality-control research. It provides multispectral imagery patches and cloud/shadow annotations for evaluating Sentinel-2 masking algorithms under complex atmospheric conditions.
feature_count: expanded global cloud/shadow patch dataset
file_size: ScienceDB/project archive

name: KappaSet Sentinel-2 Cloud and Cloud Shadow Dataset
provider: KappaZeta / KappaSet authors
coverage: Europe and globally sampled Sentinel-2 scenes, dataset-dependent
license: CC-BY-4.0 / open benchmark terms; Copernicus source data terms apply
formats: Sentinel-2 image patches, cloud and cloud-shadow masks, benchmark splits
access: GitHub/project landing page and linked data downloads
doi_or_citation: Domnich et al. / KappaSet Zenodo record 7100327
time_span: Sentinel-2 acquisitions selected for cloud/shadow benchmark
notes: Accepted as a labeled Sentinel-2 cloud/shadow benchmark with data access via project repository.
desc_zh: KappaSet 是基于 Sentinel-2 的云与云阴影检测数据集，提供多光谱影像 patch、掩膜和基准划分。它补充了 CloudSEN12 等数据集，适合比较不同云检测模型在 Sentinel-2 数据上的泛化能力。
desc_en: KappaSet is a Sentinel-2 cloud and cloud-shadow detection dataset with multispectral image patches, masks, and benchmark splits. It complements datasets such as CloudSEN12 and supports comparison of cloud-detection model generalization on Sentinel-2 data.
feature_count: 9,251 labelled Sentinel-2 sub-tiles from 1,038 products
file_size: Zenodo archive

name: Sentinel-2 Cloud Probability
provider: Sentinel Hub / Google Earth Engine mirror
theme_canonical: Cloud probability product derived from multispectral imagery
license: Copernicus/Sentinel source data terms; Sentinel Hub/GEE dataset terms
formats: GEE ImageCollection cloud probability band, Sentinel-2-linked metadata
access: Google Earth Engine Data Catalog asset COPERNICUS/S2_CLOUD_PROBABILITY
doi_or_citation: Sentinel Hub s2cloudless / GEE COPERNICUS/S2_CLOUD_PROBABILITY catalog record
notes: Accepted as a cloud-quality product directly derived from Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery. It does not deliver original spectral bands but provides an essential open mask/probability layer for multispectral workflows.
desc_zh: Sentinel-2 Cloud Probability 是基于 Sentinel-2 多光谱影像生成的云概率产品，在 Google Earth Engine 中以 `COPERNICUS/S2_CLOUD_PROBABILITY` 提供。它为每个像元提供云概率层，用于 Sentinel-2 地表反射率和影像合成工作流的云掩膜。
desc_en: Sentinel-2 Cloud Probability is a cloud-probability product derived from Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery and exposed in Google Earth Engine as `COPERNICUS/S2_CLOUD_PROBABILITY`. It provides per-pixel cloud probability layers for masking Sentinel-2 surface reflectance and compositing workflows.
feature_count: one probability band linked to Sentinel-2 granules
file_size: GEE image collection

name: Cloud Score+ Sentinel-2 Harmonized
provider: Google Earth Engine / Google Research
theme_canonical: Cloud score product derived from multispectral imagery
license: GEE dataset terms; Copernicus/Sentinel source data terms
formats: GEE ImageCollection quality score bands for Sentinel-2 Harmonized
access: Google Earth Engine Data Catalog asset GOOGLE/CLOUD_SCORE_PLUS/V1/S2_HARMONIZED
doi_or_citation: Google Earth Engine Cloud Score+ S2_HARMONIZED catalog record
notes: Accepted as a GEE-native Sentinel-2 quality-score dataset derived from multispectral imagery; tracked separately from S2 Cloud Probability because algorithm and bands differ.
desc_zh: Cloud Score+ Sentinel-2 Harmonized 是 Google Earth Engine 中面向 Sentinel-2 Harmonized 影像的云/阴影质量评分产品。它提供质量分数层，帮助用户在多光谱合成、时间序列和变化检测中筛选较清晰观测。
desc_en: Cloud Score+ Sentinel-2 Harmonized is a Google Earth Engine cloud/shadow quality-score product for Sentinel-2 Harmonized imagery. It provides quality-score bands that help select clearer observations in multispectral compositing, time-series analysis, and change-detection workflows.
feature_count: quality score bands linked to Sentinel-2 Harmonized images
file_size: GEE image collection

name: ESA WorldCover Sentinel-2 Annual Composites
provider: European Space Agency / VITO / WorldCover consortium
license: ESA WorldCover open data terms / CC-BY-4.0 style attribution terms
formats: Sentinel-2 annual composites, GeoTIFF/COG tiles, web services
access: ESA WorldCover portal and Google Earth Engine asset
doi_or_citation: ESA WorldCover Product User Manual and data access documentation, product version dependent
notes: Accepted for the Sentinel-2 annual composite data products, not the thematic land-cover map alone. The classification map itself remains a derived thematic product.
desc_zh: ESA WorldCover Sentinel-2 Annual Composites 是 WorldCover 制图过程中发布的 Sentinel-2 年度多光谱合成数据，用于支撑 10 米全球土地覆盖产品。这里收录的是可作为多光谱输入使用的年度合成影像，而不是只收最终分类图。
desc_en: ESA WorldCover Sentinel-2 Annual Composites are annual multispectral Sentinel-2 composites released in the WorldCover production workflow to support 10 m global land-cover mapping. This catalog tracks the composite imagery as multispectral input data rather than only the final thematic land-cover map.
feature_count: annual Sentinel-2 composite layers used by WorldCover
file_size: global tiled composite archive

name: S1S2-Water Sentinel-1/Sentinel-2 Water Segmentation Dataset
provider: S1S2-Water authors / remote-sensing benchmark community
coverage: global or multi-region water bodies, dataset-dependent
license: open research dataset terms; Sentinel source data terms apply
formats: Sentinel-1/Sentinel-2 paired chips, water masks, benchmark splits
access: GitHub/project repository and linked downloads
doi_or_citation: Wieland et al. 2023, S1S2-Water, DOI 10.1109/JSTARS.2023.3333969
time_span: Sentinel acquisitions selected for water segmentation benchmark
notes: Accepted for the Sentinel-2 multispectral component and paired water masks; Sentinel-1 is included as an auxiliary modality.
desc_zh: S1S2-Water 是面向水体分割的多源遥感数据集，包含 Sentinel-2 多光谱影像、Sentinel-1 SAR 和水体掩膜。它适合训练和评估水体提取、洪水/湖泊监测和多源融合模型。
desc_en: S1S2-Water is a multisource remote-sensing dataset for water segmentation, containing Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery, Sentinel-1 SAR, and water masks. It supports training and evaluation of water extraction, flood or lake monitoring, and multisensor fusion models.
feature_count: 65 Sentinel-1/Sentinel-2 triplets with quality-checked water masks
file_size: repository/Hugging Face archive

name: MUDDAT Sentinel-2 Muddy Water Benchmark Dataset
provider: Centre for Research and Technology Hellas / MUDDAT authors
license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 via Zenodo unless otherwise stated; Copernicus source data terms apply
formats: GeoTIFF Sentinel-2 L2A image data, JSON metadata, benchmark labels
access: Zenodo download and publication landing pages
doi_or_citation: Psychalas et al. 2024, MUDDAT, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.11220437; IGARSS 2024 DOI 10.1109/IGARSS53475.2024.10642051
time_span: Sentinel-2 L2A scenes selected for muddy-water benchmark, product-dependent
notes: Corrected during v005 validation from an early agricultural mislabel to the actual muddy-water Sentinel-2 benchmark. Contains 10 spectral bands resampled to 10 m according to Zenodo/OpenAIRE metadata.
desc_zh: MUDDAT 是基于 Sentinel-2 L2A 的浑水/泥水环境监测基准数据集，包含欧洲 16 个 AOI、9 个国家的 19 幅多光谱 GeoTIFF 场景及元数据。它面向泥水、沉积物相关水质异常和环境风险监测，适合水体语义分割与水质遥感方法评估。
desc_en: MUDDAT is a Sentinel-2 L2A muddy-water environmental monitoring benchmark containing 19 multispectral GeoTIFF scenes across 16 European AOIs in 9 countries, with accompanying metadata. It targets sediment-laden water and related water-quality anomalies and supports evaluation of water segmentation and water-quality remote-sensing methods.
feature_count: 19 images over 16 AOIs in 9 countries; 10 spectral bands
file_size: Zenodo archive

name: Sen2LUCAS Sentinel-2 / LUCAS Land Cover Dataset
provider: Sen2LUCAS authors / ESA Phi-Lab and collaborators
license: open research dataset terms; Copernicus source data terms apply
formats: Sentinel-2 time series around LUCAS points, labels, tabular metadata
access: Zenodo/GitHub dataset downloads
doi_or_citation: Sen2LUCAS dataset Zenodo record 14259723 and associated SenCLIP/Sen2LUCAS publications
time_span: Sentinel-2 observations matched to LUCAS survey periods, product-dependent
notes: Accepted as a Sentinel-2/LUCAS linked benchmark with multispectral time-series data and ground labels.
desc_zh: Sen2LUCAS 将欧洲 LUCAS 地面调查点与 Sentinel-2 多光谱时间序列连接起来，形成土地覆盖/土地利用学习数据集。它适合研究弱监督、点标签到像元/patch 的映射，以及基于地面样本的 Sentinel-2 分类。
desc_en: Sen2LUCAS links European LUCAS field survey points with Sentinel-2 multispectral time series to form a land-cover and land-use learning dataset. It supports weak supervision, point-label to pixel or patch mapping, and Sentinel-2 classification based on ground survey samples.
feature_count: LUCAS-linked Sentinel-2 samples and labels
file_size: Zenodo/repository archive

name: Sen4AgriNet Sentinel-2 Crop Type Benchmark
provider: Sen4AgriNet authors / European research consortium
license: open research dataset terms; Copernicus source data terms apply
formats: Sentinel-2 time-series patches, crop labels, metadata
access: Zenodo download and project repository
doi_or_citation: Sykas et al. 2022, A Sentinel-2 multi-year, multi-country benchmark dataset for crop classification and segmentation, DOI 10.1109/JSTARS.2022.3164771
notes: Accepted as a crop-type mapping benchmark with Sentinel-2 multispectral time series and labels. Not a duplicate of PASTIS because it has a distinct product boundary and benchmark design.
desc_zh: Sen4AgriNet 是面向作物类型识别的 Sentinel-2 多光谱时间序列基准，提供多区域农田样本、作物标签和影像序列。它适合训练和比较农业遥感分类模型，尤其关注跨区域泛化和作物季节动态。
desc_en: Sen4AgriNet is a Sentinel-2 multispectral time-series benchmark for crop-type mapping, providing multi-region agricultural samples, crop labels, and image sequences. It supports training and comparison of agricultural remote-sensing classifiers, especially for cross-region generalization and seasonal crop dynamics.
feature_count: multi-region Sentinel-2 crop samples
file_size: 281 GB reported by Hugging Face dataset page

name: AgriSen-COG Sentinel-2 Crop Type Mapping Dataset
provider: AgriSen-COG authors / Radiant MLHub community
coverage: Catalonia and other reported agricultural regions, product-dependent
license: CC-BY-4.0 / Radiant MLHub open benchmark terms; Copernicus source data terms apply
formats: Cloud-optimized GeoTIFFs, Sentinel-2 time series, crop labels, STAC/Radiant MLHub package
access: Zenodo download and project repository; cloud-optimized GeoTIFF archives
doi_or_citation: Sdraka et al. 2023, AgriSen-COG, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7892012; Remote Sensing 15(12), 2980
time_span: Sentinel-2 time series used for crop type mapping benchmark
notes: Accepted because it provides Sentinel-2 COG time-series data and labels through Radiant MLHub/cloud routes, not only label tables.
