desc_zh: AgriSen-COG 是面向作物类型制图的 Sentinel-2 多光谱时间序列数据集，使用 Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF 组织影像和标签。它通过 Radiant MLHub/云存储发布，适合云端训练、模型评估和农业时间序列分析。
desc_en: AgriSen-COG is a Sentinel-2 multispectral time-series dataset for crop-type mapping, organizing imagery and labels as Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFFs. Distributed through Radiant MLHub/cloud storage, it supports cloud-native training, model evaluation, and agricultural time-series analysis.
feature_count: crop-type mapping samples with Sentinel-2 COGs
file_size: Radiant MLHub archive

name: AI4Boundaries Sentinel-2 Field Boundary Dataset
provider: Radiant Earth Foundation / AI4Boundaries challenge partners
coverage: Rwanda, South Africa, and regional challenge areas
license: CC-BY-4.0 / Radiant MLHub open dataset terms; Sentinel source terms apply
formats: Sentinel-2 image chips, field-boundary labels, STAC/Radiant MLHub packages
access: ESSD data paper and ai4boundaries download package/repository
doi_or_citation: d’Andrimont et al. 2023, AI4Boundaries, Earth System Science Data 15, 317-329, DOI 10.5194/essd-15-317-2023
time_span: Sentinel-2 acquisitions selected for field-boundary mapping challenge
notes: Accepted as a field-boundary benchmark that includes 10 m Sentinel-2 monthly composites and labels; Radiant MLHub links were not used after lychee/network failures.
desc_zh: AI4Boundaries 是基于 Sentinel-2 的农田边界提取基准数据集，面向小农地块和区域农田边界制图。它提供多光谱影像芯片与边界标注，可用于训练地块分割、边界检测和农业制图模型。
desc_en: AI4Boundaries is a Sentinel-2-based field-boundary extraction benchmark for smallholder and regional agricultural parcel mapping. It provides multispectral image chips with boundary annotations for training parcel segmentation, boundary detection, and agricultural mapping models.
feature_count: field-boundary samples and Sentinel-2 imagery
file_size: Radiant MLHub archive

name: CropHarvest Global Crop Classification Dataset
provider: NASA Harvest / Radiant Earth / CropHarvest authors
coverage: global, multi-country crop and non-crop labels
license: CC-BY-4.0 / open benchmark terms; source EO data terms apply
formats: remote-sensing time series features, labels, benchmark splits, Python package
access: GitHub, package downloads, data release routes
doi_or_citation: Tseng et al. 2021/2023 CropHarvest dataset and benchmark; Zenodo 7257687
time_span: multi-year EO time series and labels, product-dependent
notes: Accepted because the dataset packages Sentinel-2 and related remote-sensing time-series inputs with global crop labels. It is more feature-oriented than raw imagery, so notes should keep that boundary explicit.
desc_zh: CropHarvest 是全球作物分类基准数据集，把 Sentinel-2 等遥感时间序列特征与多国作物/非作物标签组织成可训练样本。它适合评估跨国家、跨年份和低样本条件下的作物识别模型，但不是原始影像档案。
desc_en: CropHarvest is a global crop-classification benchmark that packages Sentinel-2 and related remote-sensing time-series features with crop/non-crop labels from many countries. It supports evaluation of crop recognition across countries, years, and low-label settings, while remaining a feature-oriented benchmark rather than a raw image archive.
feature_count: 90,000+ labelled samples reported in benchmark materials
file_size: package-managed dataset

name: TimeSen2Crop Sentinel-2 Crop Type Time Series
provider: TimeSen2Crop authors
coverage: Central Europe / Austria and neighboring agricultural regions, dataset-dependent
license: open research dataset terms; Copernicus source data terms apply
formats: Sentinel-2 time-series samples, crop type labels, benchmark splits
access: project repository and linked downloads
doi_or_citation: Weikmann et al. 2021, TimeSen2Crop, IEEE JSTARS, DOI 10.1109/JSTARS.2021.3073965; Zenodo 4715631
notes: Accepted as a Sentinel-2 crop-type time-series benchmark distinct from BreizhCrops/PASTIS. Link stability will be checked by lychee before finalizing.
desc_zh: TimeSen2Crop 是 Sentinel-2 作物类型时间序列分类数据集，提供多时相多光谱观测和作物标签。它适合研究循环网络、Transformer 和时序特征对作物识别的作用。
desc_en: TimeSen2Crop is a Sentinel-2 crop-type time-series classification dataset with multi-date multispectral observations and crop labels. It supports research on recurrent networks, transformers, and temporal feature design for crop recognition.
feature_count: over 1.1 million pixel-level Sentinel-2 time-series samples
file_size: 14.9 GB reported by Hugging Face mirror

name: EuroCropsML Sentinel-2 Crop Type Dataset
provider: EuroCropsML authors / EuroCrops community
coverage: Europe, country-specific parcels and crop labels
license: open research dataset terms; Sentinel/Copernicus source terms apply
formats: Sentinel-2 time-series samples, EuroCrops labels, ML-ready files
access: Zenodo/GitHub dataset release routes
doi_or_citation: Reuss and Macdonald 2024, EuroCropsML, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10629609; Reuss et al. 2025 Scientific Data DOI 10.1038/s41597-025-04952-7
notes: Accepted as an ML-ready Sentinel-2/EuroCrops benchmark if final URL verification succeeds; distinct from EuroCrops vector labels because it packages multispectral time series.
desc_zh: EuroCropsML 将 EuroCrops 地块/作物标签与 Sentinel-2 多光谱时间序列连接，形成机器学习可用的作物类型识别数据。它补充了仅含矢量标签的 EuroCrops，适合跨区域作物分类和迁移学习。
desc_en: EuroCropsML links EuroCrops parcel and crop labels with Sentinel-2 multispectral time series to form a machine-learning-ready crop-type dataset. It complements the vector-only EuroCrops labels and supports cross-region crop classification and transfer learning.
feature_count: 706,683 Sentinel-2 labelled time-series data points across 176 classes
file_size: Zenodo/repository archive

name: Multiannual Crop Mapping Dataset in Peru
provider: Crop mapping Peru dataset authors
license: open research dataset terms; Sentinel source data terms apply
formats: Sentinel-2 time-series imagery, crop labels, multiannual splits
access: Zenodo download and publication/repository evidence
doi_or_citation: Multiannual crop mapping dataset in Peru Zenodo record and associated publication
notes: Accepted as a regional multiannual Sentinel-2 crop mapping benchmark.
desc_zh: Multiannual Crop Mapping Dataset in Peru 是秘鲁农业区域的多年 Sentinel-2 多光谱作物制图数据集，包含时序影像与作物标签。它适合研究多年迁移、区域适应和热带/干旱农业区作物识别。
desc_en: The Multiannual Crop Mapping Dataset in Peru is a multi-year Sentinel-2 multispectral crop-mapping dataset for agricultural regions in Peru, containing time-series imagery and crop labels. It supports research on multi-year transfer, regional adaptation, and crop recognition in tropical or arid agricultural systems.
feature_count: multiannual Peru crop samples
file_size: Zenodo archive

name: xBD / xView2 Disaster Damage Assessment Dataset
provider: xView2 / Carnegie Mellon University / Maxar / Defense Innovation Unit
coverage: global disaster events across multiple countries
license: CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 style challenge/data terms; Maxar imagery terms apply
formats: pre- and post-disaster high-resolution satellite image chips, building polygons, damage labels
access: xView2 challenge portal and GitHub tools
doi_or_citation: xBD: A Dataset for Assessing Building Damage from Satellite Imagery; Gupta et al. 2019/2020
time_span: 2011-2018 disaster events represented in released benchmark, product-dependent
notes: Accepted as a high-resolution multi-band disaster benchmark with pre/post satellite imagery and labels. Keep license/access restrictions explicit; some workflows expose RGB renderings, so downstream users should inspect delivered bands before spectral analyses.
desc_zh: xBD / xView2 是全球灾害建筑损伤评估数据集，提供灾前/灾后高分辨率卫星影像、建筑轮廓和损伤等级标签。它常用于灾后快速评估、变化检测和建筑损毁识别；本目录将其作为开放研究用途的多波段灾害遥感基准记录。
desc_en: xBD / xView2 is a global disaster damage assessment dataset with pre- and post-event high-resolution satellite imagery, building footprints, and damage-level labels. It is widely used for post-disaster assessment, change detection, and building damage recognition, and is tracked here as a multi-band disaster remote-sensing benchmark with explicit access restrictions.
feature_count: 850,736 building annotations reported by dataset paper
file_size: large challenge archive

name: SpaceNet 8 Flood Detection and Road Network Dataset
provider: SpaceNet LLC / Maxar / Capella / AWS Open Data
coverage: New Orleans and other challenge AOIs, product-dependent
license: SpaceNet open challenge terms / CC-BY-SA-style terms
formats: pre/post high-resolution optical imagery, SAR imagery, flood labels, road labels
access: AWS Open Data Registry SpaceNet bucket and challenge repositories
doi_or_citation: SpaceNet 8 Flood Detection Challenge dataset documentation
notes: Accepted as a distinct SpaceNet flood/disaster benchmark; not a duplicate of SpaceNet 6/7 because it adds flood labels and road-network tasks.
desc_zh: SpaceNet 8 是面向洪水检测和道路网络提取的开放遥感挑战数据集，组合高分辨率光学影像、SAR 影像、洪水标签和道路标签。它适合研究灾害场景下的多源融合、洪水制图和交通基础设施受灾评估。
desc_en: SpaceNet 8 is an open remote-sensing challenge dataset for flood detection and road-network extraction, combining high-resolution optical imagery, SAR imagery, flood labels, and road labels. It supports research on multisensor fusion, flood mapping, and transport-infrastructure assessment in disaster settings.
scale: sub-meter optical imagery plus SAR, product-dependent
feature_count: flood and road labels with pre/post imagery
file_size: AWS S3 challenge archive

name: SEN12-FLOOD Sentinel-1/2 Flood Dataset
provider: SEN12-FLOOD authors / Source Cooperative
license: open research dataset terms; Copernicus source data terms apply
formats: Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery, flood masks, metadata
access: Source Cooperative bucket and project repository
doi_or_citation: SEN12-FLOOD dataset documentation and associated publication
time_span: flood events sampled from Sentinel-1/2 archive, product-dependent
notes: Accepted for the Sentinel-2 multispectral component and flood labels; Sentinel-1 is auxiliary.
desc_zh: SEN12-FLOOD 是面向洪水制图的 Sentinel-1/Sentinel-2 多源数据集，包含 Sentinel-2 多光谱影像、Sentinel-1 SAR 和洪水掩膜。它适合训练和评估洪水检测、云遮挡条件下的多源融合以及灾害响应模型。
desc_en: SEN12-FLOOD is a multisource flood-mapping dataset with Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery, Sentinel-1 SAR, and flood masks. It supports training and evaluation of flood detection, multisensor fusion under cloudy conditions, and disaster-response models.
feature_count: Sentinel-1/2 flood samples and masks
file_size: cloud object storage archive

name: HLS Burn Scars Dataset
provider: NASA IMPACT / IBM / Prithvi wildfire team
license: Apache-2.0 / open model-data terms where stated; NASA HLS source terms apply
formats: Harmonized Landsat Sentinel-2 image chips, burn scar masks, Hugging Face dataset files
access: Hugging Face dataset and project/model documentation
doi_or_citation: NASA/IBM Prithvi wildfire burn-scar dataset release
time_span: HLS acquisitions around wildfire events, product-dependent
notes: Accepted as a burn-scar benchmark using HLS multispectral imagery, distinct from official HLS product rows because it packages labels and task-ready samples.
desc_zh: HLS Burn Scars Dataset 使用 Harmonized Landsat Sentinel-2 多光谱影像和火烧迹地标签构建，用于训练火烧迹地分割和灾后评估模型。它与 HLS 官方产品不同，提供面向任务的样本、标签和机器学习工作流。
desc_en: The HLS Burn Scars Dataset packages Harmonized Landsat Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery with burn-scar labels for training burned-area segmentation and post-fire assessment models. Unlike the official HLS product rows, it provides task-ready samples, labels, and machine-learning workflows.
feature_count: HLS burn-scar image/mask samples
file_size: Hugging Face dataset archive

name: FireSR Wildfire Burned Area Super-Resolution and Segmentation Dataset
provider: FireSR authors / wildfire remote-sensing community
coverage: Canada wildfire events larger than 2000 ha, 2017-2023
license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 unless otherwise stated; Sentinel/Landsat source terms apply
formats: multispectral satellite imagery, super-resolution inputs, burned-area segmentation labels, Zenodo archive
access: Zenodo download and publication evidence
doi_or_citation: FireSR dataset Zenodo record 13384289 and associated publication
notes: Replaced an unstable FireScars candidate after lychee found its Zenodo record gone. FireSR is kept because the Zenodo record is live and describes a burned-area super-resolution/segmentation dataset.
desc_zh: FireSR 是面向野火火烧区域超分辨率与分割的多光谱遥感数据集，覆盖加拿大 2017-2023 年超过 2000 公顷的野火事件。它提供用于高分辨率火烧迹地监测的影像和标签，适合火灾灾后制图和机器学习模型评估。
desc_en: FireSR is a multispectral remote-sensing dataset for wildfire burned-area super-resolution and segmentation, covering Canadian wildfire events larger than 2000 ha from 2017 to 2023. It provides imagery and labels for high-resolution burned-area monitoring, post-fire mapping, and machine-learning model evaluation.
feature_count: Canadian wildfire events larger than 2000 ha from 2017-2023
file_size: Zenodo archive

name: Landsat Collection 2 Level-3 Burned Area Science Product
provider: U.S. Geological Survey / NASA
license: public domain / USGS open data
formats: GeoTIFF science product layers, burned area, burn date, QA
access: USGS EarthExplorer and Landsat product pages
doi_or_citation: USGS Landsat Collection 2 Level-3 Burned Area Science Product documentation
notes: Accepted as an official Landsat multispectral-derived burned-area product; it does not deliver raw spectral bands but is directly derived from Landsat surface reflectance and is central for burn monitoring.
desc_zh: Landsat Collection 2 Level-3 Burned Area Science Product 是 USGS 发布的官方火烧迹地科学产品，基于 Landsat 多光谱地表反射率生成火烧区域、燃烧日期和质量层。它适合长期火灾影响、恢复和土地覆盖变化研究。
desc_en: The Landsat Collection 2 Level-3 Burned Area Science Product is an official USGS burned-area product derived from Landsat multispectral surface reflectance, providing burned area, burn date, and quality layers. It supports long-term fire impact, recovery, and land-cover change studies.
feature_count: burned area, burn date, and QA layers
file_size: global Landsat science product archive

name: Landsat Burned Area Essential Climate Variable
provider: NASA MEaSUREs / University of Maryland / ORNL DAAC
license: NASA open data
formats: GeoTIFF/NetCDF-style gridded burned-area products, ORNL DAAC archive
access: ORNL DAAC data landing page and DOI download services
doi_or_citation: Hawbaker et al. 2017/2020 Landsat Burned Area Essential Climate Variable, ORNL DAAC dataset 1646
notes: Accepted as a long-term Landsat-derived burned-area climate record, complementary to USGS Collection 2 Level-3 Burned Area.
desc_zh: Landsat Burned Area Essential Climate Variable 是 NASA MEaSUREs 支持的长期火烧面积气候数据记录，基于 Landsat 多光谱影像识别全球火烧区域。它适合研究多年代火灾扰动、碳循环、生态恢复和气候影响。
desc_en: The Landsat Burned Area Essential Climate Variable is a NASA MEaSUREs long-term burned-area climate data record derived from Landsat multispectral imagery. It supports multi-decadal studies of fire disturbance, carbon cycling, ecological recovery, and climate impacts.
feature_count: global Landsat burned-area time series
file_size: ORNL DAAC archive

name: ISPRS Vaihingen 2D Semantic Labeling Dataset
provider: ISPRS / German Association of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing (DGPF)
license: ISPRS benchmark terms; data access by request for scientific benchmarking
formats: true orthophoto tiles with near-infrared/red/green channels, DSM/nDSM, semantic labels
access: ISPRS benchmark landing page and data request workflow
doi_or_citation: ISPRS 2D Semantic Labeling Benchmark / Vaihingen data set; Rottensteiner et al. benchmark publications
time_span: airborne campaign date not the primary dataset axis; benchmark released through ISPRS UrbanSemLab
notes: Accepted because the benchmark distributes very-high-resolution airborne imagery with NIR/R/G channels plus reference labels. Access is request/terms based rather than anonymous bulk download, so it is marked as registration/terms required.
desc_zh: ISPRS Vaihingen 2D Semantic Labeling Dataset 是城市语义标注经典航空遥感基准，提供含近红外、红、绿通道的真正射影像、DSM/nDSM 和精细语义标签。它常用于建筑、道路、树木、低矮植被和不透水面等城市对象的高分辨率分类评测。
desc_en: The ISPRS Vaihingen 2D Semantic Labeling Dataset is a classic urban aerial remote-sensing benchmark with true orthophotos containing near-infrared, red, and green channels, together with DSM/nDSM data and semantic labels. It is widely used to evaluate high-resolution classification of buildings, roads, trees, low vegetation, and impervious surfaces.
feature_count: 33 orthophoto tiles with reference labels, DSM/nDSM support layers
file_size: distributed by ISPRS benchmark request; size varies by package

name: ISPRS Potsdam 2D Semantic Labeling Dataset
provider: ISPRS / German Association of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing (DGPF)
license: ISPRS benchmark terms; data access by request for scientific benchmarking
formats: RGBIR true orthophoto tiles, DSM/nDSM, semantic labels
access: ISPRS benchmark landing page and data request workflow
doi_or_citation: ISPRS 2D Semantic Labeling Benchmark / Potsdam data set; Rottensteiner et al. benchmark publications
time_span: airborne campaign date not the primary dataset axis; benchmark released through ISPRS UrbanSemLab
notes: Accepted as a distinct ISPRS benchmark site because Potsdam has its own RGBIR tiles, labels, and evaluation split. It is not merged with Vaihingen because the city, imagery package, and benchmark splits differ.
desc_zh: ISPRS Potsdam 2D Semantic Labeling Dataset 是面向城市精细语义分割的航空多光谱基准，包含 RGBIR 正射影像、DSM/nDSM 与像素级类别标注。它与 Vaihingen 互补，常用于测试高分辨率城市地物分类、域泛化和影像-高程融合方法。
desc_en: The ISPRS Potsdam 2D Semantic Labeling Dataset is an aerial multispectral benchmark for detailed urban semantic segmentation, providing RGBIR orthophotos, DSM/nDSM layers, and pixel-level class labels. It complements Vaihingen and is often used for high-resolution urban classification, domain generalization, and image-elevation fusion studies.
feature_count: 38 orthophoto tiles with reference labels and DSM/nDSM support layers
file_size: distributed by ISPRS benchmark request; size varies by package

name: Zurich Summer QuickBird Dataset
provider: ETH Zurich / remote-sensing benchmark authors
theme_canonical: High-resolution satellite multispectral urban land-cover benchmark
license: research benchmark archive terms on Zenodo; upstream QuickBird imagery terms may apply
formats: QuickBird multispectral image tiles with near-infrared, red, green, and blue bands; land-cover labels
access: Zenodo record download and citation page
doi_or_citation: Zurich Summer Dataset Zenodo record 5914759; Volpi and Ferrari land-cover mapping benchmark publications
time_span: summer QuickBird acquisition; benchmark release archived on Zenodo
notes: Accepted as a compact but influential four-band high-resolution satellite benchmark. It is explicitly multispectral through the QuickBird NIR/R/G/B channels and is useful for urban land-cover classification.
desc_zh: Zurich Summer QuickBird Dataset 是覆盖瑞士苏黎世的高分辨率城市土地覆盖基准，使用 QuickBird 的近红外、红、绿、蓝四个多光谱波段。数据集规模较小但引用广泛，适合测试城市土地覆盖分类、特征学习和小样本遥感模型。
desc_en: The Zurich Summer QuickBird Dataset is a high-resolution urban land-cover benchmark over Zurich, Switzerland, using four QuickBird multispectral bands: near-infrared, red, green, and blue. Although compact, it is widely cited for testing urban land-cover classification, representation learning, and small-sample remote-sensing models.
feature_count: 20 labeled QuickBird image tiles
file_size: Zenodo-hosted benchmark archive

name: FLAIR #1 Semantic Segmentation Dataset
provider: Institut national de l’information géographique et forestière (IGN France) / FLAIR consortium
license: Etalab Open License 2.0 / FLAIR dataset terms as published by IGN
formats: very-high-resolution aerial imagery with visible and near-infrared channels, semantic land-cover labels, Hugging Face/GitHub distribution
access: FLAIR documentation, GitHub release workflow, and Hugging Face dataset hosting
doi_or_citation: FLAIR #1 dataset and challenge documentation by IGN France / FLAIR consortium
time_span: aerial acquisitions compiled for FLAIR #1; release circa 2022-2023
notes: Accepted because FLAIR #1 exposes high-resolution aerial imagery with NIR information for semantic segmentation, not just RGB photos. Hugging Face and the FLAIR portal are retained as evidence/access routes.
desc_zh: FLAIR #1 是法国 IGN 牵头发布的高分辨率航空遥感语义分割数据集，面向土地覆盖制图，提供含可见光和近红外信息的航空影像及标注。它适合评估大范围、高分辨率、多区域条件下的地物分类模型。
desc_en: FLAIR #1 is a high-resolution aerial remote-sensing semantic segmentation dataset led by IGN France for land-cover mapping, providing aerial imagery with visible and near-infrared information plus labels. It supports evaluation of land-cover models across large, high-resolution, multi-region conditions.
feature_count: large collection of labeled aerial patches over France
file_size: large hosted archive; use provider/Hugging Face metadata for current package sizes

name: FLAIR #2 Multi-Source Land Cover Dataset
provider: IGN France / FLAIR consortium
theme_canonical: Multi-source aerial and satellite multispectral land-cover benchmark
coverage: France, selected training and test regions
license: Etalab Open License 2.0 / FLAIR dataset terms as published by IGN
formats: very-high-resolution aerial imagery, Sentinel-2 time series, labels, benchmark metadata
access: FLAIR documentation and Hugging Face dataset hosting
doi_or_citation: FLAIR #2 challenge and dataset documentation by IGN France / FLAIR consortium
time_span: aerial imagery and Sentinel-2 time series assembled for FLAIR #2
notes: Accepted separately from FLAIR #1 because FLAIR #2 adds a multi-source setting that combines very-high-resolution aerial imagery with Sentinel-2 multispectral temporal context.
desc_zh: FLAIR #2 扩展了 FLAIR 系列的开放土地覆盖基准，将法国高分辨率航空影像与 Sentinel-2 多光谱时间序列等多源信息结合。它适合研究航空影像与卫星多光谱时序融合、跨区域泛化和精细土地覆盖制图。
desc_en: FLAIR #2 extends the FLAIR open land-cover benchmark by combining high-resolution French aerial imagery with Sentinel-2 multispectral time-series context and related metadata. It is useful for aerial-satellite fusion, cross-region generalization, and detailed land-cover mapping.
scale: very-high-resolution aerial plus Sentinel-2 multispectral benchmark
feature_count: multi-source labeled patches and temporal satellite context
file_size: large hosted archive; use provider/Hugging Face metadata for current package sizes

name: FLAIR-HUB Multi-Modal Remote Sensing Dataset
provider: IGN France / FLAIR consortium / Hugging Face community hosting
theme_canonical: Multi-modal aerial and satellite multispectral land-cover benchmark
coverage: France and FLAIR project study areas, dataset subset dependent
license: FLAIR/IGN open-data terms; consult Hugging Face dataset card for subset-specific terms
formats: aerial imagery, satellite multispectral time series, land-cover labels, model-ready dataset assets
access: Hugging Face dataset card and FLAIR project documentation
doi_or_citation: FLAIR-HUB Hugging Face dataset card and FLAIR project documentation
time_span: project-maintained multi-modal archive; subset temporal coverage varies
notes: Accepted as a newer FLAIR hub record because it consolidates multi-modal remote-sensing assets and model-oriented data access. It should be revisited later to split stable subdatasets if the hub exposes persistent DOI/versioned packages.
desc_zh: FLAIR-HUB 是 FLAIR 生态中的多模态遥感开放数据入口，面向土地覆盖和语义理解任务汇聚航空影像、卫星多光谱时序和标签等资源。它适合作为跟踪法国开放高分辨率遥感基准及其模型化数据包的入口。
desc_en: FLAIR-HUB is a multi-modal open remote-sensing data entry point in the FLAIR ecosystem, gathering aerial imagery, satellite multispectral time series, labels, and model-oriented assets for land-cover and semantic understanding tasks. It is a useful lead for tracking French open high-resolution remote-sensing benchmarks and packaged model datasets.
scale: multi-modal aerial and satellite benchmark hub
feature_count: hub-level collection; subset counts vary by release
file_size: Hugging Face-hosted assets; size varies by subset

name: IEEE GRSS Data Fusion Contest 2021 Track MSD Dataset
provider: IEEE GRSS Image Analysis and Data Fusion Technical Committee / competition organizers
theme_canonical: Multispectral semantic change and land-cover benchmark
coverage: Maryland, United States competition study area
license: competition/open research benchmark terms; upstream NAIP, Landsat, and ancillary source terms apply
formats: NAIP RGB-NIR imagery, Landsat time series, building footprints/land-cover labels, baseline repository metadata
access: IEEE GRSS contest page and public baseline repository with dataset instructions
doi_or_citation: 2021 IEEE GRSS Data Fusion Contest Track MSD documentation and baseline repository
time_span: multi-temporal NAIP/Landsat inputs for the 2021 contest, product-dependent
notes: Accepted because the MSD track is explicitly a multispectral data-fusion/change setting involving NAIP RGB-NIR and Landsat imagery. The direct Azure blob index was not used as a verified evidence URL because lychee could not connect reliably in this environment; the official contest page and GitHub baseline are live.
desc_zh: IEEE GRSS 2021 Data Fusion Contest Track MSD 是面向语义变化和土地覆盖制图的多源多光谱竞赛数据集，使用 NAIP RGB-NIR 航空影像、Landsat 时序和辅助标签。它适合评估多时相、多传感器融合以及建筑/土地覆盖变化检测方法。
desc_en: The IEEE GRSS 2021 Data Fusion Contest Track MSD dataset is a multisource multispectral benchmark for semantic change and land-cover mapping, using NAIP RGB-NIR aerial imagery, Landsat time series, and ancillary labels. It supports evaluation of multi-temporal, multi-sensor fusion and building or land-cover change detection methods.
scale: NAIP RGB-NIR plus Landsat multispectral fusion benchmark
feature_count: competition train/test regions and label packages; exact counts follow contest metadata
file_size: large competition archive; direct package sizes depend on selected download route

name: Dynamic World V1 Near Real-Time Land Cover
provider: Google / World Resources Institute / National Geographic Society
license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 for Dynamic World data, with Sentinel-2 source terms
formats: per-pixel land-cover probabilities and labels derived from Sentinel-2 L1C imagery; Google Earth Engine ImageCollection
access: Google Earth Engine asset GOOGLE/DYNAMICWORLD/V1, Dynamic World web app, and publication evidence
doi_or_citation: Brown et al. 2022, Dynamic World, Scientific Data, DOI 10.1038/s41597-022-01307-4
notes: Accepted as a Sentinel-2 multispectral-derived analysis product rather than raw imagery. The GEE asset is the main operational access path; Dynamic World is not duplicated with Sentinel-2 MSI because it delivers land-cover probabilities and labels. The Scientific Data DOI is retained in the citation field rather than the lychee URL list because the Nature landing page introduces cookie/login redirects.
desc_zh: Dynamic World V1 是基于 Sentinel-2 多光谱影像生成的近实时全球土地覆盖产品，提供逐像元类别概率和最终类别标签。它适合快速监测土地覆盖变化、构建训练样本和在 Google Earth Engine 中进行全球尺度分析。
desc_en: Dynamic World V1 is a near real-time global land-cover product derived from Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery, providing per-pixel class probabilities and final land-cover labels. It supports rapid land-cover change monitoring, training-data workflows, and global-scale analysis in Google Earth Engine.
feature_count: ImageCollection with near real-time Sentinel-2 scene-derived probability layers
file_size: cloud-hosted ImageCollection; export size depends on region and date range

name: JRC Global Surface Water
provider: European Commission Joint Research Centre
coverage: global inland and coastal surface water
license: European Commission/JRC open data reuse terms, cite the dataset and publications
formats: global gridded water occurrence, seasonality, recurrence, transitions, monthly history layers; downloads and GEE asset
access: JRC data catalogue/download services, Global Surface Water Explorer, and Google Earth Engine asset JRC/GSW1_4/GlobalSurfaceWater
doi_or_citation: Pekel et al. 2016 Nature; JRC Global Surface Water dataset DOI 10.2905/JRC.YEQMSPG
time_span: 1984-present product version dependent; v1.4 covers 1984-2021 in GEE catalog
notes: Accepted as a canonical Landsat multispectral-derived global water product. The DOI URL redirects to the JRC catalogue landing page, so the resolved JRC page is used as the primary verified URL.
desc_zh: JRC Global Surface Water 使用长期 Landsat 多光谱影像制图全球地表水出现频率、季节性、变化和月度历史。它是开放水体变化研究、湿地监测、水资源评估和洪水背景分析中最常用的全球产品之一。
desc_en: JRC Global Surface Water maps global surface-water occurrence, seasonality, change, and monthly history from long-term Landsat multispectral imagery. It is a widely used open product for water-change studies, wetland monitoring, water-resource assessment, and flood-context analysis.
feature_count: global water occurrence/change layers and monthly history
file_size: global raster products; download size depends on layer and tiling

name: Hansen Global Forest Change
provider: University of Maryland GLAD / Google / USGS / NASA partners
theme_canonical: Landsat-derived global forest-cover and loss product
license: open research data with required Hansen et al. citation and provider terms
formats: tree canopy cover, forest loss, gain, loss year, data mask rasters; cloud downloads and GEE asset
access: Google Earth Engine asset UMD/hansen/global_forest_change_* and GLAD/Google cloud download pages
doi_or_citation: Hansen et al. 2013 Science, High-Resolution Global Maps of 21st-Century Forest Cover Change
notes: Accepted as a Landsat multispectral-derived global forest product with both GEE access and provider download pages. It is distinct from GLAD Landsat ARD because this row describes the forest-cover/loss analytical product, not the surface-reflectance archive.
desc_zh: Hansen Global Forest Change 基于 Landsat 多光谱影像生成全球森林覆盖、树冠覆盖度、森林损失年份和增益等栅格层。它是全球森林砍伐、恢复、碳排放和保护成效评估中的核心开放数据产品。
desc_en: Hansen Global Forest Change derives global forest cover, tree canopy cover, annual loss year, and gain layers from Landsat multispectral imagery. It is a core open dataset for studying deforestation, recovery, carbon emissions, and conservation outcomes.
scale: 30m global Landsat-derived forest-cover and loss layers
feature_count: global annual forest-loss and forest-cover layers
file_size: global tiled rasters; size depends on layer and tile selection

name: Annual National Land Cover Database
provider: U.S. Geological Survey / Multi-Resolution Land Characteristics Consortium
coverage: United States, including available NLCD mapped areas and products
license: USGS public domain open data
formats: annual land-cover, impervious surface, and related raster layers; ScienceBase/MRLC downloads
access: USGS ScienceBase data release, USGS Annual NLCD data-access page, and MRLC distribution routes
doi_or_citation: USGS Annual NLCD data release, DOI 10.5066/P94UXNTS
time_span: 1985-2024 in current Annual NLCD release family, product dependent
notes: Accepted as a Landsat-derived operational land-cover product. It is geographically narrower than global products but important because it provides annual U.S. land-cover/impervious records with official USGS distribution.
desc_zh: Annual National Land Cover Database 是 USGS/MRLC 发布的美国年度土地覆盖产品，基于 Landsat 多光谱时间序列生成土地覆盖、不透水面等栅格层。它适合美国范围的长期城市扩张、土地利用变化、生态建模和环境评估。
desc_en: The Annual National Land Cover Database is a USGS/MRLC annual U.S. land-cover product derived from Landsat multispectral time series, including land-cover and impervious-surface layers. It supports long-term studies of urban growth, land-use change, ecological modeling, and environmental assessment across the United States.
feature_count: annual CONUS/US product layers and related NLCD rasters
file_size: large national raster downloads; size depends on year and layer

name: MODIS Land Cover Type MCD12Q1
provider: NASA LP DAAC / MODIS Land Cover Science Team
license: NASA open data
formats: HDF-EOS/GeoTIFF-style global land-cover classification layers; Earthdata and GEE access
access: NASA Earthdata/LP DAAC and Google Earth Engine asset MODIS/061/MCD12Q1
doi_or_citation: MODIS/Terra+Aqua Land Cover Type Yearly L3 Global 500m SIN Grid V061, DOI 10.5067/MODIS/MCD12Q1.061
notes: Accepted as a global MODIS multispectral-derived annual land-cover product. It complements raw MODIS surface-reflectance rows already in the catalogue by adding a classified thematic product.
desc_zh: MODIS Land Cover Type MCD12Q1 是 NASA 发布的全球年度土地覆盖分类产品，基于 Terra/Aqua MODIS 多光谱观测生成多个分类体系的土地覆盖层。它适合全球变化、生态系统建模、气候模式陆面参数化和长期土地覆盖分析。
desc_en: MODIS Land Cover Type MCD12Q1 is a NASA global annual land-cover classification product derived from Terra/Aqua MODIS multispectral observations, providing multiple classification schemes. It is useful for global-change studies, ecosystem modeling, land-surface parameterization, and long-term land-cover analysis.
feature_count: annual global land-cover layers with multiple classification schemes
file_size: global yearly rasters; size depends on access route and subset

name: USDA Cropland Data Layer
provider: USDA National Agricultural Statistics Service
theme_canonical: Satellite-derived annual cropland and crop-type product
coverage: United States, state/year availability varies historically
license: USDA/NASS public data with citation requested
formats: annual crop-specific raster classifications, CropScape download services, GEE asset
access: USDA NASS Cropland Data Layer/CropScape services and Google Earth Engine asset USDA/NASS/CDL
doi_or_citation: USDA NASS Cropland Data Layer documentation and CropScape distribution
notes: Accepted as an operational crop-type product derived from satellite imagery and agricultural ground information. It is not just a crop benchmark; it is an official annual U.S. raster product with download and GEE access.
desc_zh: USDA Cropland Data Layer 是美国农业部发布的年度作物类型和土地覆盖栅格产品，利用卫星影像和农业统计/样本信息生成。它适合美国农业种植结构、作物轮作、产量建模和土地利用变化研究。
desc_en: The USDA Cropland Data Layer is an annual crop-type and land-cover raster product produced from satellite imagery and agricultural reference information. It supports U.S. agricultural mapping, crop-rotation analysis, yield modeling, and land-use change studies.
feature_count: annual crop and land-cover classification rasters
file_size: national/state yearly rasters; size depends on year and extraction route

name: MODIS Vegetation Continuous Fields MOD44B
provider: NASA LP DAAC / MODIS Vegetation Continuous Fields team
license: NASA open data
formats: percent tree cover, non-tree vegetation, bare ground, and QA raster layers; Earthdata/GEE access
access: NASA MODIS product documentation and Google Earth Engine asset MODIS/061/MOD44B
doi_or_citation: MODIS Vegetation Continuous Fields MOD44B V061 documentation and NASA LP DAAC product citation
notes: Accepted as a MODIS multispectral-derived vegetation structure product. GEE is used as the stable checked landing page here, with NASA MODIS product documentation retained as evidence.
desc_zh: MODIS Vegetation Continuous Fields MOD44B 基于 MODIS 多光谱观测估算全球树木覆盖、非树木植被和裸地百分比等连续变量。它适合森林覆盖、草地/裸地比例、陆面模型和生态系统变化研究。
desc_en: MODIS Vegetation Continuous Fields MOD44B estimates continuous global percentages of tree cover, non-tree vegetation, and bare ground from MODIS multispectral observations. It supports studies of forest cover, vegetation fractions, land-surface modeling, and ecosystem change.
scale: 250m global annual MODIS vegetation fraction layers
feature_count: annual global percent tree/non-tree/bare layers and QA
file_size: global yearly rasters; size depends on access route and subset

name: GFSAD30 Global Cropland Extent Product
provider: USGS / NASA MEaSUREs Global Food Security-support Analysis Data project
license: USGS/NASA open data, cite GFSAD publications and data sources
formats: 30m global cropland extent raster layers, regional products, GEE Community Catalog access
access: USGS GFSAD documentation, publication evidence, and Earth Engine Community Catalog project page
doi_or_citation: USGS Professional Paper 1868 and GFSAD30/GCEP30 product documentation
time_span: nominal circa 2010-2015 product family, region/product dependent
notes: Accepted as a global 30m cropland extent product derived primarily from Landsat and other multispectral data. The Earth Engine Community Catalog page is recorded as an analysis-access lead, but the row is canonicalized to the USGS/NASA GFSAD product.
desc_zh: GFSAD30 Global Cropland Extent Product 是 USGS/NASA MEaSUREs 支持的全球 30 米耕地范围产品，主要基于 Landsat 等多光谱遥感数据制图。它适合全球粮食安全、耕地面积统计、农业用地变化和区域农田制图研究。
desc_en: The GFSAD30 Global Cropland Extent Product is a 30 m global cropland extent dataset supported by USGS/NASA MEaSUREs and derived primarily from Landsat and related multispectral remote-sensing data. It supports global food-security analysis, cropland-area statistics, agricultural land-use change, and regional cropland mapping.
feature_count: global and regional cropland extent layers
file_size: large global/regional rasters; size depends on product and access route

name: Copernicus Global Land Service NDVI 300m V3

desc_en: EOxCloudless Sentinel-2 10 m Global Cloudless Mosaic is a global cloudless 10 m mosaic product derived from Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery. It supports basemapping, visual inspection, training-sample annotation, and high-resolution global mapping workflows.

desc_zh: LandCoverNet 是面向土地覆盖分类的 Sentinel-2 多光谱机器学习数据集，提供影像切片、类别标签和元数据。它适合训练和评估土地覆盖分类模型，尤其适合开放基准和跨区域泛化研究。
desc_en: LandCoverNet is a Sentinel-2 multispectral machine-learning dataset for land-cover classification, providing image chips, class labels, and metadata. It supports training and evaluation of land-cover models, open benchmarking, and cross-region generalization studies.
feature_count: labeled Sentinel-2 chips, release dependent
file_size: Source-hosted archive; size depends on release and subset

desc_en: RapidAI4EO is a multisource Earth-observation machine-learning dataset that organizes Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery, higher-resolution Planet imagery, and related labels or metadata into a training corpus. It is useful for multi-resolution fusion, transfer learning, weak supervision, and rapid mapping.
scale: Sentinel-2 plus higher-resolution Planet ML corpus

desc_en: The full Functional Map of the World dataset is a high-resolution satellite benchmark for global functional-site recognition, including multispectral imagery, RGB imagery, category labels, and metadata. It supports scene classification, temporal generalization, geographic bias analysis, and large-scale remote-sensing recognition models.
scale: very-high-resolution multispectral and RGB scene chips
feature_count: large labeled global scene collection, release dependent
file_size: large benchmark archive; size depends on full or RGB-only subset

desc_en: SSL4EO-S12 is a large-scale Sentinel-1/Sentinel-2 dataset for self-supervised learning, with Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery as a core modality and seasonal sampling structure. It supports remote-sensing foundation-model pretraining, multimodal representation learning, and cross-task transfer.

file_size: large MediaTUM archive; size depends on selected modality and subset

desc_en: MARIDA is a Sentinel-2 multispectral semantic segmentation dataset for floating marine debris and related marine or coastal classes, providing image patches and class annotations. It supports marine debris monitoring, coastal water classification, small-target detection, and environmental remote-sensing model evaluation.

desc_en: M3LEO is an open multimodal Earth-observation dataset for foundation models and multilabel learning, including Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery and related labels or modalities. desc_en: SpaceNet 5 Road Network and Travel Time Dataset is a high-resolution remote-sensing benchmark for road networks and travel-time estimation, with WorldView imagery and road/route labels over multiple cities. It supports road extraction, road-graph construction, accessibility estimation, and disaster-response routing studies.

desc_en: Copernicus Data Space Sentinel-2 Global Mosaics is the official CDSE Sentinel-2 global mosaic collection exposed through a STAC access route, including global or quarterly cloudless mosaic products. desc_en: The Global Sentinel-2 Snow Semantic Segmentation Dataset is an open Sentinel-2 multispectral dataset for snow-cover semantic segmentation, providing image chips and class labels such as snow and background. It supports snow mapping, mountain and high-latitude remote-sensing segmentation, cloud-snow discrimination, and cryosphere model evaluation.

desc_en: The Brazil Forest Imagery Dataset 2008 Analytic Basemap is a 10 m SPOT 2/4/5-derived multispectral basemap of Brazil produced by Google for the circa-2008 Forest Code reference period. It provides green, red and near-infrared reflectance plus ancillary date and source-satellite bands for historical vegetation and land-use analysis. desc_zh: Theia SPOT 5 Take5 Surface Reflectance Dataset 是 CNES/CESBIO 在 SPOT 5 卫星寿命末期开展的 Sentinel-2 类时间序列实验数据。数据覆盖全球约 150 个站点，时间为 2015 年 4-9 月，提供 10 米多光谱 Level-1C 顶层大气反射率和 Level-2A 地表反射率及云、水、雪等掩膜。该数据为 Sentinel-2 正式运行前的高重访多光谱方法验证提供了开放样本。
desc_en: The Theia SPOT 5 Take5 Surface Reflectance Dataset is a CNES/CESBIO end-of-life SPOT 5 experiment designed to emulate Sentinel-2-like time series before Sentinel-2 operations. The dataset is useful for pre-Sentinel-2 algorithm testing and time-series studies.

access: Hugging Face dataset repository nascetti-a/BioMassters; project page; alternate IBM-NASA Prithvi-formatted mirror
doi_or_citation: BioMassters Hugging Face DOI 10.57967/hf/1009; Nascetti et al. BioMassters NeurIPS Datasets and Benchmarks 2023
time_span: Sentinel-1/2 features from 2016-2021; 12 monthly images per reference chip as described by pages
notes: Accepted as a multimodal benchmark with explicit Sentinel-2 MSI bands and CC-BY-4.0 license. It is included in the multispectral catalog because Sentinel-2 MSI is a core input, while noting Sentinel-1 SAR is also included.
seen_in_passes: v021: forest biomass and Hugging Face benchmark pass; primary, project and IBM-NASA mirror URLs lychee-verified
desc_zh: BioMassters Sentinel-1/2 Forest Biomass Benchmark 是用于芬兰森林地上生物量估计的多模态卫星时序基准数据集。数据包含 Sentinel-1 SAR、Sentinel-2 MSI 多波段月度时序，以及由机载 LiDAR 和实测校准得到的生物量参考图，覆盖 2016-2021 年。它以 CC-BY-4.0 发布，适合研究 Sentinel-2 多光谱与 SAR 融合的森林生物量反演。
desc_en: The BioMassters Sentinel-1/2 Forest Biomass Benchmark is a multimodal satellite time-series dataset for above-ground biomass estimation in Finnish forests. It combines Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 MSI monthly multispectral time series, and biomass reference maps derived from airborne LiDAR calibrated with in-situ measurements for 2016-2021. Released under CC-BY-4.0, it supports studies of Sentinel-2 multispectral and SAR fusion for forest biomass retrieval.
openness: public Hugging Face access under CC-BY-4.0
evidence: Hugging Face primary page lists DOI, cc-by-4.0 license, Sentinel-1 SAR and Sentinel-2 MSI features, Sentinel-2 bands B2/B3/B4/B5/B6/B7/B8/B8A/B11/B12 plus cloud probability, 12 months of data, 310,000 patches and dataset sizes; project page describes Finland forest biomass benchmark.
access_class: repository download; Hugging Face dataset storage
scale: Finnish forest patches; 2560 m chips / 256x256 reformatted chips; Sentinel-2 time series
feature_count: about 13,000 patches / 310,000 feature patches; 11,462 reference images in IBM-NASA mirror
file_size: about 201 GB on Hugging Face mirror

name: California Burned Areas (CaBuAr) Sentinel-2 Dataset
provider: DarthReca / CaBuAr authors / Hugging Face
license: CDLA-Permissive-2.0
formats: HDF5 files, metadata parquet, Hugging Face dataset repository
access: Hugging Face dataset repository with raw and normalized HDF5 files
doi_or_citation: Hugging Face dataset DarthReca/california_burned_areas
time_span: California wildfire samples derived from Sentinel-2 archive; dataset version modified 2026-05-02 on Hugging Face
notes: Accepted as a CaBuAr burned-area benchmark because the repository exposes HDF5 data files, metadata, CDLA-Permissive-2.0 license metadata, and a Sentinel-2 burned-area task lineage. The linked GitHub repository found in search returned 404, so only the live Hugging Face route is used.
desc_zh: California Burned Areas（CaBuAr）是面向加州火烧迹地分割的 Sentinel-2 多光谱基准数据集，Hugging Face 仓库提供 raw/normalized HDF5 文件和元数据。它适合训练和评估火烧区提取、灾害变化检测以及多光谱波段组合方法。
desc_en: California Burned Areas (CaBuAr) is a Sentinel-2 multispectral benchmark for burned-area segmentation over California wildfire regions. The Hugging Face repository exposes raw and normalized HDF5 files plus metadata, making it useful for burn-scar extraction, disaster change detection, and multispectral band-combination studies.
openness: open data with CDLA-Permissive license metadata
scale: sub-1K sample category on Hugging Face; multiple HDF5 scene and patch files
feature_count: California burned-area HDF5 scene/patch files and metadata
file_size: Hugging Face repository files; exact aggregate size not listed in catalog metadata

name: Sentinel-2 Multitemporal Cities Pairs (S2MTCP)
provider: Wageningen University / ONERA-associated authors / Zenodo
license: CC-BY-4.0
formats: 7z archive, metadata CSV, README, Sentinel-2 Level-1C image pairs
access: Zenodo record with downloadable S2MTCP_data.7z and metadata CSV
doi_or_citation: 10.5281/zenodo.4280482; Leenstra et al., Self-supervised pre-training enhances change detection in Sentinel-2 imagery, PRRS workshop, ICPR 2020
time_span: multi-temporal Sentinel-2 Level-1C pairs, product-dependent acquisition dates
notes: Accepted as a separate Sentinel-2 urban image-pair benchmark with 1,520 city-focused pairs; not a duplicate of OSCD because it is larger, unlabeled/self-supervised oriented, and has its own Zenodo DOI and metadata.
desc_zh: S2MTCP 收集了全球城市区域的 1,520 对 Sentinel-2 Level-1C 多时相影像，低于 10 m 的波段被重采样到 10 m 并裁剪为约 600 x 600 像元。数据通过 Zenodo 以 CC-BY-4.0 发布，适合自监督预训练、城市变化检测和多时相 Sentinel-2 表征学习。
desc_en: Sentinel-2 Multitemporal Cities Pairs contains 1,520 Sentinel-2 Level-1C image pairs over urban areas worldwide. Bands coarser than 10 m are resampled and scenes are cropped to roughly 600 x 600 pixels, supporting self-supervised pretraining, urban change detection, and multi-temporal Sentinel-2 representation learning.
feature_count: 1,520 paired Sentinel-2 Level-1C city image chips plus metadata
file_size: S2MTCP_data.7z about 10.64 GB plus metadata CSV

name: Satellite Burned Area Dataset
provider: Politecnico di Torino / Zenodo authors
license: CC-BY-4.0
formats: ZIP archives, CSV fold definition, Sentinel-2 and Sentinel-1 acquisitions
access: Zenodo record with five downloadable archive parts and metadata CSV; baseline code on GitHub
time_span: past forest wildfire acquisitions, product-dependent dates
notes: Accepted for its Sentinel-2 multispectral component and burned-area delineation/severity-estimation labels. Sentinel-1 is auxiliary; the catalog tracks it here because the delivered dataset includes Sentinel-2 acquisitions and a clear burned-area benchmark boundary.
desc_zh: Satellite Burned Area Dataset 包含 73 组与历史森林火灾相关的 Sentinel-2 和 Sentinel-1 卫星观测，并提供分折 CSV。它用于火烧区边界提取和烧毁严重度估计，补充了 HLS Burn Scars 与 Landsat 官方火烧产品之外的样本级训练数据。
desc_en: The Satellite Burned Area Dataset contains 73 satellite acquisitions from Sentinel-2 and Sentinel-1 associated with past forest wildfires, with fold definitions supplied in a CSV file. It is designed for burned-area delineation and severity-estimation model training and validation, complementing HLS and Landsat burned-area products with sample-level benchmark data.
feature_count: five archive parts plus satellite_data.csv fold metadata
file_size: about 13.7 GB across five ZIP archive parts plus CSV

name: Sen2Fire Wildfire Detection Sentinel Dataset
provider: Sen2Fire authors / Zenodo
coverage: four study areas for wildfire detection, product-dependent regions
license: CC-BY-4.0
formats: ZIP archive, Sentinel-2 multispectral patches, Sentinel-5P aerosol band, labels, baseline code
access: Zenodo record with Sen2Fire.zip and baseline code archive
time_span: study-area acquisitions sampled from Sentinel-2/Sentinel-5P, product-dependent dates
notes: Accepted because the record explicitly describes 2,466 512x512 patches with 13 bands, including Sentinel-2 multispectral bands and a Sentinel-5P aerosol index, with train/validation/test splits.
desc_zh: Sen2Fire 是用于野火检测的 Sentinel 数据基准，Zenodo 记录提供 2,466 个 512 x 512 影像块。每个样本包含 Sentinel-2 多光谱波段和 Sentinel-5P 气溶胶指数，并配有训练、验证、测试区域划分，适合研究波段选择、火点检测和火灾遥感模型。
desc_en: Sen2Fire is a wildfire-detection benchmark built from Sentinel data and distributed on Zenodo. It provides 2,466 512 x 512 patches with Sentinel-2 multispectral bands plus a Sentinel-5P aerosol index, along with train, validation, and test study-area splits for band-selection and fire-detection research.
feature_count: 2,466 512x512 patches with Sentinel-2/Sentinel-5P channels and labels
file_size: Sen2Fire.zip about 6.35 GB plus baseline code archive

name: CanadaFireSat Sentinel-2 Wildfire Forecasting Benchmark
provider: EPFL ECEO / CanadaFireSat authors / Hugging Face
license: MIT
formats: Hugging Face parquet dataset shards, Sentinel-2 multiresolution arrays, labels, environmental predictors
access: Hugging Face dataset repository and public GitHub data-construction code
doi_or_citation: arXiv:2506.08690; Hugging Face dataset EPFL-ECEO/CanadaFireSat
time_span: Sentinel-2 Level-1C imagery from 2015-2023 with Canadian burned-area references
notes: Accepted as a large Sentinel-2 wildfire forecasting benchmark. The public GitHub README documents Sentinel-2 Level-1C imagery from Google Earth Engine, 2015-2023, 64-day pre-fire windows, and NBAC fire polygons; the Hugging Face API reports MIT license, 12 configurations, and multiresolution Sentinel-2 feature arrays. Raw HF README access required authentication during probing, so the public HF landing page and GitHub README are used as evidence.
desc_zh: CanadaFireSat 是面向加拿大高分辨率野火预测的多源基准数据集，核心影像来自 2015-2023 年 Sentinel-2 Level-1C 多光谱时间序列。Hugging Face 数据集按省区配置发布 parquet 分片，包含 10 m、20 m、60 m Sentinel-2 多分辨率数组、火灾标签和环境预测因子，适合野火风险预测与多源融合研究。
desc_en: CanadaFireSat is a Canadian high-resolution wildfire-forecasting benchmark built around Sentinel-2 Level-1C multispectral time series from 2015-2023. The Hugging Face dataset publishes provincial/territorial parquet shards with 10 m, 20 m, and 60 m Sentinel-2 arrays, fire labels, and environmental predictors, supporting wildfire-risk forecasting and multisource fusion research.
openness: open dataset under MIT metadata on Hugging Face
scale: 12 Canadian regional configurations; large parquet shard collection
feature_count: Sentinel-2 multiresolution time-series arrays, labels, and environmental predictor layers
file_size: hundreds of GB aggregate dataset size reported by Hugging Face API across configurations

name: MODIS Terra Snow Cover Daily L3 Global 500m V061 (MOD10A1)
provider: NASA NSIDC DAAC / NASA GSFC MODAPS
theme_raw: MOD10A1; MODIS/Terra Snow Cover Daily L3 Global 500m SIN Grid V061
license: NASA free and open data policy; citation requested
formats: HDF-EOS2 tiles on 500 m sinusoidal grid; Earthdata/NSIDC download services
access: NSIDC product page and NASA Earthdata access for MOD10A1 Version 61
notes: Accepted as an official optical multispectral-derived cryosphere product. NSIDC states the daily composite provides snow cover and albedo from MODIS/Terra snow-cover swath data, includes NDSI snow-cover values, and is distributed as 500 m HDF-EOS2 tiles.
desc_zh: MOD10A1 是 NASA NSIDC 发布的 Terra MODIS 全球日尺度雪盖产品，提供 500 m 正弦投影瓦片中的雪盖、反照率和 NDSI 雪盖信息。它由 MODIS 光学多光谱观测生成，适合全球积雪时空变化、雪线监测和水文气候研究。
desc_en: MOD10A1 is the NASA NSIDC Terra MODIS daily global snow-cover product at 500 m resolution. It provides snow-cover, albedo, and NDSI snow-cover information derived from optical multispectral MODIS observations, supporting global snow dynamics, snowline monitoring, and hydroclimate studies.
openness: NASA free and open policy; no restrictions on use with citation strongly urged
feature_count: daily global 10 x 10 degree snow-cover/albedo tiles
file_size: granule-based archive, size varies by date and tile

desc_zh: MYD10A1 是 Aqua MODIS 全球日尺度雪盖产品，提供 500 m 雪盖与反照率信息，是 Terra MOD10A1 的互补观测源。该产品基于光学多光谱 MODIS 数据，常用于积雪监测、云影响对比和 Terra/Aqua 多源雪盖分析。
desc_en: MYD10A1 is the Aqua MODIS daily global snow-cover product at 500 m resolution, complementing Terra MOD10A1 with Aqua overpass observations. It is derived from optical multispectral MODIS data and supports snow monitoring, cloud-impact comparison, and combined Terra/Aqua snow-cover analysis.
openness: NASA free and open policy; no restrictions on use with citation strongly urged
feature_count: daily global 10 x 10 degree snow-cover/albedo tiles
file_size: granule-based archive, size varies by date and tile

desc_zh: VNP10A1 是 Suomi-NPP VIIRS 全球日尺度雪盖产品，空间分辨率为 375 m，并使用 NDSI 与一系列筛选逻辑识别雪盖。它延续 MODIS 雪盖产品体系，适合 2012 年以来的全球积雪监测和多传感器时间序列研究。
desc_en: VNP10A1 is the Suomi-NPP VIIRS daily global snow-cover product at 375 m resolution. It identifies snow cover using NDSI and screening logic, extending the MODIS snow-cover record for post-2012 multisensor snow monitoring and time-series analysis.
openness: NASA free and open policy; no restrictions on use with citation strongly urged
feature_count: daily global VIIRS snow-cover tiles
file_size: granule-based archive, size varies by date and tile

notes: Accepted as a distinct cloud-gap-filled product rather than a duplicate of MOD10A1. NSIDC states MOD10A1F provides daily CGF snow-cover maps derived from MODIS/Terra snow-cover inputs and includes polar-darkness and other scene flags.
desc_zh: MOD10A1F 是 Terra MODIS 云隙填补日尺度雪盖产品，面向减少云遮挡对连续雪盖制图的影响。它基于 MODIS 光学多光谱雪盖输入生成 500 m 日尺度全球瓦片，适合积雪持续性、融雪过程和长期水文应用。
desc_en: MOD10A1F is the Terra MODIS cloud-gap-filled daily snow-cover product designed to reduce cloud-related gaps in snow mapping. It derives 500 m daily global tiles from MODIS optical multispectral snow-cover inputs and is useful for snow persistence, melt timing, and long-term hydrological studies.
openness: NASA free and open policy; no restrictions on use with citation strongly urged
scale: global daily cloud-gap-filled 500 m tiled product
feature_count: daily global cloud-gap-filled snow-cover tiles
file_size: granule-based archive, size varies by date and tile

desc_zh: Copernicus 北半球雪盖范围产品提供 1 km 日尺度雪盖栅格，时间范围为 2018-2026 并持续更新。它以 SNPP VIIRS 卫星观测为传感器来源，通过 CLMS/CDSE 发布，适合北半球积雪监测、近实时水文应用和气候服务。
desc_en: The Copernicus Northern Hemisphere Snow Cover Extent product provides daily 1 km snow-cover extent rasters for 2018-2026 with regular updates. It is based on SNPP VIIRS satellite observations and distributed through CLMS/CDSE for Northern Hemisphere snow monitoring, near-real-time hydrology, and climate-service applications.
openness: Copernicus full, open and free access with attribution
scale: Northern Hemisphere daily 1 km raster time series
feature_count: daily snow-cover extent raster layers and metadata
file_size: large time-series archive; size varies by download subset

provider: Copernicus Land Monitoring Service

desc_zh: Copernicus 全球雪盖范围产品提供全球陆地区域（不含南极洲）1 km 日尺度雪盖栅格，时间范围从 2025 年 12 月开始并持续更新。产品使用 Sentinel-3A/B SLSTR 和 NOAA-20 VIIRS 观测，通过 CLMS/CDSE 开放获取，适合全球雪盖近实时监测。
desc_en: The Copernicus Global Snow Cover Extent product provides daily 1 km snow-cover extent rasters for global land areas excluding Antarctica, starting in December 2025. It uses Sentinel-3A/B SLSTR and NOAA-20 VIIRS observations and is openly distributed through CLMS/CDSE for global near-real-time snow monitoring.
openness: Copernicus full, open and free access with attribution
scale: global daily 1 km raster time series excluding Antarctica
feature_count: daily snow-cover extent raster layers and metadata
file_size: large time-series archive; size varies by download subset

license: ESA CCI Snow terms and conditions via CEDA

desc_zh: ESA Snow CCI SCFG V4.0 是基于 Terra MODIS 光学观测的全球逐日雪盖比例气候数据记录，空间间隔约 0.01 度，覆盖 2000-2023 年。CEDA 发布 NetCDF 文件和 DOI，适合长期积雪比例、气候变化和模型验证研究。
desc_en: ESA Snow CCI SCFG V4.0 is a daily global snow-cover-fraction climate data record derived from Terra MODIS optical observations at about 0.01 degree spacing for 2000-2023. Distributed through CEDA with a DOI and NetCDF files, it supports long-term snow-fraction, climate-change, and model-evaluation studies.
openness: public CEDA archive under ESA CCI Snow terms and conditions
scale: daily global 0.01 degree snow-cover-fraction time series
feature_count: 8.64K NetCDF files in CEDA catalogue
file_size: 819 GB listed by CEDA

name: MODIS Terra+Aqua MAIAC Land Aerosol Optical Depth Daily 1km V061 (MCD19A2)
provider: NASA LP DAAC / NASA GSFC MODAPS
theme_canonical: MAIAC MODIS aerosol optical depth multispectral product

desc_zh: MCD19A2 是 NASA LP DAAC 发布的 Terra+Aqua MODIS MAIAC 陆地气溶胶光学厚度日尺度 1 km 产品。它提供 0.47 与 0.55 微米 AOD、不确定性、细模态比例、柱水汽和观测几何等变量，适合气溶胶、空气质量背景、地表大气校正和长期大气环境分析。
desc_en: MCD19A2 is the NASA LP DAAC Terra+Aqua MODIS MAIAC daily 1 km land aerosol optical depth product. It provides AOD at 0.47 and 0.55 micrometers, uncertainty, fine-mode fraction, column water vapor, and view geometry variables, supporting aerosol, air-quality context, atmospheric correction, and long-term atmospheric studies.
openness: NASA/LP DAAC open data with no restrictions on subsequent use, sale, or redistribution; citation requested
access_class: NASA Earthdata/LP DAAC; cloud access; Google Earth Engine mirror
scale: global land daily 1 km gridded product
feature_count: daily tiled AOD, water vapor, QA and geometry layers
file_size: granule-based archive; size varies by date and tile

desc_en: MOD04_L2 is the Terra MODIS 5-minute Level-2 aerosol swath product at about 10 km resolution. It retrieves aerosol optical thickness and related aerosol properties from MODIS multispectral reflectance observations over oceans and parts of continents, supporting global aerosol monitoring and atmospheric-correction research.

feature_count: Terra MODIS aerosol optical thickness and ancillary aerosol layers
file_size: granule-based archive, size varies by swath
